posts.content:
牧人心語

『家，添幸福』是我們教會今年的主題。我希望能在主耶穌基督裡為大家加添點幸福。

我們教會在上星期六舉行了今年的領袖動員大會。為了加添我們的家庭、我們屬靈的家，和將來在天家的幸福，教牧同工擬定了幾個事工重點：（一）鼓勵追求靈命更新，（二）推動家庭門徒訓練，（三）強化跨代事工，（四）重整生命小組。

這些是教會的大方向，不能在一年內完成，但希望能在今年啟動，鼓勵全教會的弟兄姊妹一起努力，讓我們的『家』能多添點幸福。

幸福的家，無論是我們自己的家或是屬靈的家，都不會自動產生，必須家中每個成員共同努力才能實現。其中一個秘訣，是不求別人怎樣待自己，卻要求自己要以愛和真誠待人。聖經說：不要只顧自己，也要關心別人的利益。（腓立比書 2:4）我們要先讓別人感到幸福，自己才會感到幸福。求神幫助我們能一起建立一個幸福的『家！』

上主日，我們在半島的福音堂和隔鄰的播道會有茶點交誼時間，氣氛十分融洽，並計劃於二月八日有第二次交誼活動，隨後一起參加市公園舉辦的農暦新年慶祝活動。

我們各個堂會已安排了不同的網上和實體查經課程，請勿錯過研讀神話語和學習查考聖經的機會。請留意各個堂會的報告或向堂會主任查詢詳情。

按立執事籌備委員會已於上週開會，跟進提名執事候選人接受培訓等事宜。若弟兄姊妹欲提名合資格的弟兄姊妹接受培訓，請資詢被提名人同意後，連同和議人簽名於一月卅一日前郵寄或送交教會辦事處，信封上請註明給按立執事籌備委員會啟。

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 感謝神讓我們的領袖動員大會順利舉行。求神幫助教牧同工們能帶領全會眾完成『家，添幸福』的目標，使自己的家能培育信徒，我們的教會能健康發展。
  • 為各堂會已安排的查經活動祈禱。求神呼召更多弟兄姊妹一起報名參加，讓神的話觸動和改變我們的生命。
  • 為教會正積極尋找傳道人加入教會事奉祈禱。求神將祂為我們教會預備的牧者引領到我們當中，與其他牧者一起配搭服事，完成教會使命。
  • 為教會籌備按立執事的計劃能順利完成祈禱。求神感動合資格並愛主的弟兄姊妹願意接受提名並接受訓練，以備將來被選立為教會執事，協助教牧照顧和牧養會眾。
  • 為世界各地在戰亂和貧困中的災民祈禱。祈求神的憐憫和拯救早日臨到，使他們對人生仍滿有盼望。

奉獻簡報

十二月常費奉獻 $ 695,801.64
一月常費奉獻 $ 73,407.86
十二月差傳奉獻 $ 13,431.99
一月差傳奉獻 $ 1,079.11
十二月社區中心奉獻 $ 3,287.85
一月社區中心奉獻 $ 1,500.00

財政簡報

一月至十一月總收入： $ 2,658,214.00
一月至十一月總開支： $ 3,056,803.20
一月至十一月缺欠： $ 398,589.20

From the Heart of a Shepherd

” Family Bliss: Adding Happiness to Our Home” is our church’s theme this year. I pray that we could add a little happiness to our home in the Lord Jesus Christ.

We held our church’s annual leadership rally last Saturday. The priorities for our church ministry are: (1) encouraging the pursuit of spiritual renewal; (2) promoting family discipleship training; (3) strengthening intergenerational ministry; and (4) revitalizing life groups.

These are the church’s overall directions, which cannot be completed in one year, but we would like to kick off this year. We want to encourage all our brothers and sisters in Christ to work together for adding more happiness to our home.

A happy home, whether our own or our spiritual home, does not appear automatically; it requires the joint efforts of every member in the home. One of the keys is not to ask how others treat us, but to demand of ourselves to treat others with love and sincerity. The Bible says: “Do not look to yourselves, but also to the benefit of others” (Philippians 2:4). We must first make others happy before we ourselves will be happy. May God help us to build a happy home together!

Last Sunday, we had a snack fellowship with the Evangelical Free Church next to our Peninsula mission church. The atmosphere was very harmonious, and we plan to have a second fellowship on February 8th, followed by a Lunar New Year celebration organized by the city park administration.

Our various church campuses have arranged different online and in-person Bible study classes. Please do not miss this opportunity to study God’s Word and learn to examine the Bible. Please pay attention to the reports from your respective church campus or inquire with your campus pastor for details.

The Ordination of Deacons Preparatory Committee met last week to follow up on matters such as the nomination of potential deacons candidates for training. If any brothers or sisters wish to nominate a qualified brother or sister for training, please obtain the nominee’s consent and, along with the signature of the conciliator, mail or deliver the nomination to the church office before January 31st. Please indicate “To the Ordination of Deacons Preparatory Committee” on the envelope.

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • We thank God that our leadership rally was successfully held. Pray that God will help our pastors to lead the entire congregation to achieve the goal of “adding happiness to our home.”
  • Pray for the Bible study classes arranged by each church campus. Pray that God will call more brothers and sisters to participate, so that His word can touch and change their lives.
  • Pray for the active search for pastors/ministers to join the ministry team of our church. Ask God to bring the pastors He has prepared for us to help fulfill the church’s mission.
  • Pray for the progress of the deacon ordination plan. Pray that God will move qualified brothers and sisters who love the Lord to accept nomination and training so that they may be elected as church deacons in the near future, assisting pastors in caring for and shepherding the congregation.
  • Pray for the victims of war and poverty around the world. Pray that God’s mercy and salvation will come soon, so that they may still have hope for life.

Offerings Summary

Dec. General offering $ 695,801.64
Jan. General offering $ 73,407.86
Dec. Mission offering $ 13,431.99
Jan. Mission offering $ 1,079.11
Dec. Community Center offering $ 3,287.85
Jan. Community Center offering $ 1,500.00

Jan. to Nov. Expenses ： $ 3,056,803.20
Jan. to Nov. Deficit ： $ 398,589.20

posts.excerpt: 牧人心語 我在去年底參加了在芝加哥舉行的芝華基督徒大會。這會議每兩年舉辦一次，這次的主題是『願你的國降臨：末後世代教會的見證。』 『願你的國降臨』這個基督徒願望，可以有幾個不同的解讀。願你的國降臨，因為这個世界太恐佈、太殘酷、有太多問題、太多苦難，願你的國降臨！ 願你的國降臨！因為福音已傳遍天下，教會已經完成了使命。願你的國降臨！ 還有第三個解讀。願你的國降臨，願你的旨意行在地上，如同行在天上。教會仍在努力傳福音，在地上拓展神的國度，願你的國降臨！ 我認為第三個解讀最接近現實，但教會在這末後的世代要完成福音遍傳的使命，似乎面對很多困難。因為魔鬼正在作垂死掙扎，它正千方百計，讓教會的使命被模糊化、信仰被世俗化、真理被主觀化、事工被被制度化、罪惡被常態化，甚至傳福音也被方程式化。 主內的弟兄姊妹，我們知道在美國的教會，有三分二以上是七十人以下的小教會，而那些極少數的超級大教會，有好幾家正面對出席人數大幅下滑的嚴峻挑戰。在美國的教會，似乎失去了應有的生命力，令很多基督徒置疑，我們的教會真能完成使命嗎？ 但耶穌在升天前告訴門徒：這天國的福音要傳遍天下，對萬民作見證，然後末期才來到。（馬太福音 24: 14）換句話說，我們若想天國降臨，就先要把天國的福音傳遍天下，而教會，就是神把天國福音傳遍天下的設計。 教牧同工將從這個星期開始，傳講以弗所書裡有關教會的信息，祈求神建造我們成為一個滿有生命力的教會。讓我們能在這個末後的世代，努力不懈地傳講天國福音，讓天國可以早日降臨。 二零二六年一月十日，星期六下午二時卅分，我們將於 San Leandro分堂舉行全教會領袖大會，請所有堂會的教牧同工、事工領袖和生命小組組長至緊出席參加。 教會於去年年底的會員大會中，通過了有關修改教會執事候選人的資格，並已張貼在各分堂和聚會點的報告版上，大家亦可到教會網頁上查閱(點擊這裡），並提名合資格的候選人給按立執事籌備委員會審核，經篩選後邀請接受執事候選人訓練。提名人必須聯同和議人以書面提名並簽名，放入信封後封口，於今年一月卅一日前郵寄或送交教會辦事處。 作執事的，也是如此：必須端莊，不一口兩舌，不好喝酒，不貪不義之財；要存清潔的良心，固守真道的奧祕。這等人也要先受試驗，若沒有可責之處，然後叫他們作執事。（提摩太前書 3: 8-10） 招牧師 代禱事項 感謝神讓我們平安渡過一年。求神指引我們新一年中保守我們在信仰上不失腳，能過得勝、討神喜悅的生活。 為即將在二月中舉行的雅歌夫婦營祈禱。求神感動愛主、願意在婚姻生活上見證主、榮耀神的弟兄姊妹們盡早報名參加。 為恩美傳道和黃正傳道祈禱。他們將從今年開始，轉移他們事奉的地點。求神賜智慧並指引他們的道路，使用他們建立我們在Pleasanton 和Milpitas分堂的國語事工。 為教牧同工祈禱。他們需要呼召更多義工幫忙拓展各聚會點的工作。求神指導他們善用時間，並有智慧帶領弟兄姊妹互相服事，建立教會，使教會日益興旺。 為教會開始接受教會執事候選人提名並接受訓練祈禱。求神預備合資格並愛主的弟兄姊妹們願意被提名接受訓練。 奉獻簡報 每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37 […]
posts.content:
牧人心語

我在去年底參加了在芝加哥舉行的芝華基督徒大會。這會議每兩年舉辦一次，這次的主題是『願你的國降臨：末後世代教會的見證。』

『願你的國降臨』這個基督徒願望，可以有幾個不同的解讀。願你的國降臨，因為这個世界太恐佈、太殘酷、有太多問題、太多苦難，願你的國降臨！

願你的國降臨！因為福音已傳遍天下，教會已經完成了使命。願你的國降臨！

還有第三個解讀。願你的國降臨，願你的旨意行在地上，如同行在天上。教會仍在努力傳福音，在地上拓展神的國度，願你的國降臨！

我認為第三個解讀最接近現實，但教會在這末後的世代要完成福音遍傳的使命，似乎面對很多困難。因為魔鬼正在作垂死掙扎，它正千方百計，讓教會的使命被模糊化、信仰被世俗化、真理被主觀化、事工被被制度化、罪惡被常態化，甚至傳福音也被方程式化。

主內的弟兄姊妹，我們知道在美國的教會，有三分二以上是七十人以下的小教會，而那些極少數的超級大教會，有好幾家正面對出席人數大幅下滑的嚴峻挑戰。在美國的教會，似乎失去了應有的生命力，令很多基督徒置疑，我們的教會真能完成使命嗎？

但耶穌在升天前告訴門徒：這天國的福音要傳遍天下，對萬民作見證，然後末期才來到。（馬太福音 24: 14）換句話說，我們若想天國降臨，就先要把天國的福音傳遍天下，而教會，就是神把天國福音傳遍天下的設計。

教牧同工將從這個星期開始，傳講以弗所書裡有關教會的信息，祈求神建造我們成為一個滿有生命力的教會。讓我們能在這個末後的世代，努力不懈地傳講天國福音，讓天國可以早日降臨。

二零二六年一月十日，星期六下午二時卅分，我們將於 San Leandro分堂舉行全教會領袖大會，請所有堂會的教牧同工、事工領袖和生命小組組長至緊出席參加。

教會於去年年底的會員大會中，通過了有關修改教會執事候選人的資格，並已張貼在各分堂和聚會點的報告版上，大家亦可到教會網頁上查閱(點擊這裡），並提名合資格的候選人給按立執事籌備委員會審核，經篩選後邀請接受執事候選人訓練。提名人必須聯同和議人以書面提名並簽名，放入信封後封口，於今年一月卅一日前郵寄或送交教會辦事處。

作執事的，也是如此：必須端莊，不一口兩舌，不好喝酒，不貪不義之財；要存清潔的良心，固守真道的奧祕。這等人也要先受試驗，若沒有可責之處，然後叫他們作執事。（提摩太前書 3: 8-10）

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 感謝神讓我們平安渡過一年。求神指引我們新一年中保守我們在信仰上不失腳，能過得勝、討神喜悅的生活。
  • 為即將在二月中舉行的雅歌夫婦營祈禱。求神感動愛主、願意在婚姻生活上見證主、榮耀神的弟兄姊妹們盡早報名參加。
  • 為恩美傳道和黃正傳道祈禱。他們將從今年開始，轉移他們事奉的地點。求神賜智慧並指引他們的道路，使用他們建立我們在Pleasanton 和Milpitas分堂的國語事工。
  • 為教牧同工祈禱。他們需要呼召更多義工幫忙拓展各聚會點的工作。求神指導他們善用時間，並有智慧帶領弟兄姊妹互相服事，建立教會，使教會日益興旺。
  • 為教會開始接受教會執事候選人提名並接受訓練祈禱。求神預備合資格並愛主的弟兄姊妹們願意被提名接受訓練。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37
十一月常費奉獻 $ 274,703.53
十二月常費奉獻 $ 586,553.66
十一月差傳奉獻 $ 2,669.11
十二月差傳奉獻 $ 12,881.99
十一月社區中心奉獻 $ 1,500.00
十二月社區中心奉獻 $ 3,287.85

財政簡報

一月至十一月總收入： $ 2,658,214.00
一月至十一月總開支： $ 3,056,803.20
一月至十一月缺欠： $ 398,589.20

From the Heart of a Shepherd

I attended the Chicago Christian Conference at the end of last year. This conference is held every two years, and this year’s theme was “Your Kingdom Comes: The Testimony of the Church in the Last Days.”

The Christian wish “Your Kingdom Comes” can be interpreted in several different ways. One interpretation is: Your Kingdom comes because this world is too terrifying, too cruel, with too many problems and suffering. May Your Kingdom come

Another interpretation is: Your Kingdom comes because the Gospel has been spread throughout the world, and the church has fulfilled its mission. May Your Kingdom come!

A third interpretation is: Your Kingdom comes, your will is done on earth as it is in heaven. The church is still striving to spread the Gospel and expand God’s Kingdom on earth. May Your Kingdom come!

I believe the third interpretation is closest to reality, but the church seems to face many difficulties in fulfilling its mission of spreading the Gospel in these last days. Because the devil is making a death throe; it is trying every means to blur the church’s mission, secularize our faith, make truth become subjective, ministry is institutionalized, sin is normal, and even evangelism is being formularized.

Brothers and sisters in Christ, we know that over two-thirds of churches in the United States are small churches with fewer than 70 members, and several mega churches are facing the serious challenge of a significant decline in attendance. The churches in America seem to have lost their vitality, leading many Christians to question whether our churches can truly fulfill their mission.

But before Jesus ascended to heaven, He told His disciples: “This gospel of the kingdom will be preached in the whole world as a testimony to all nations, and then the end will come.” (Matthew 24:14) In other words, if we want the Kingdom of Heaven to come, we must first spread the gospel of the Kingdom throughout the world, and the church is God’s design for spreading the gospel of the Kingdom.

Starting this week, our pastors will preach the message about the church from Ephesians, praying that God will build us up into a vibrant church. Let us strive tirelessly to share the gospel of the Kingdom in these last days, so that the Kingdom may come soon.

On Saturday, January 10, 2026, at 2:30 PM, we will be holding a church leadership rally at our San Leandro Campus. All pastors, ministry leaders, and life-group leaders from all campuses are requested to attend.

At the annual membership meeting at the end of last year, the church approved amendments to the qualifications for church deacon candidates. These amendments have been posted on the bulletin boards of all campuses and mission churches, and the revised qualifications can be found on the church website also (click here). Please recommend qualified candidates for review by the ordination planning committee. After screening, candidates will be invited to receive deacon candidate training. Nominator must submit a written nomination, signed by both nominator and conciliator, sealed in an envelope, and mail or deliver to the church office before January 31st of this year.

Those who serve as deacons must also be upright, not two-faced, not drink alcohol, and not covet unjust gains; they must have a pure conscience and hold fast to the mystery of the faith. Such people must first be tested, and if they are blameless, then they shall be appointed as deacons. (1 Timothy 3:8-10)

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Thank God for allowing us to pass through last year with peace. Pray that God will guide us in the new year, keeping us from straying in our faith, and enabling us to live victorious and pleasing lives.
  • Pray for the Song of Solomon Couples Retreat to be held in mid-February. Pray that God will move brothers and sisters who love the Lord and are willing to witness for Him and glorify Him in their married lives to register as soon as possible.
  • Pray for Pastor En-mei and Pastor Zheng Huang. They will be relocating their ministry to another campus this year. Pray that God will grant them wisdom and guide their path, using them to build our Mandarin ministry in our Pleasanton and Milpitas campuses.
  • Pray for our pastoral staff. They need to call upon more volunteers to help strengthen their ministry at various mission sites. Pray that God will guide them to use their time wisely and lead brothers and sisters to serve one another, build up the church, and make it prosper.
  • Pray that the church will begin accepting nominations for church deacons and for them to receive training. Pray that God will prepare qualified brothers and sisters who love the Lord to be nominated and receive training.

posts.title: 2025-12-21-shepherdsheart
posts.excerpt: 牧人心語 這個星期四就是聖誕節。在過去的星期五，在紐約市舉行了一個耶穌降生的花車大遊行；而在今年五月，紐約市已經舉行了一個名為『耶穌是主』的花車大遊行**。我和師母在YouTube觀看了一會，發覺花車的設計、陣容和所傳遞的信息，都令我們讚嘆不已。但最令我驚訝的，是這兩個花車遊行，竟能在極自由開放如紐約市的地方舉行，而且做到有聲有色，街道兩旁都擠滿了，是教會離開安全舒坦區，走到街外傳福音的一個美好見證。 商場佈道，Let’s Go 123於上星期六完成了今年最後一次活動，我為那些經常參加的弟兄姊妹感恩，因為他們也是願意走出自己的安全舒坦區，去到人群當中去分享信仰、傳揚福音，並引領了很多人信主。我是多麼希望有更多弟兄姊妹參加這個活動，習慣隨時隨地與人分享信仰，成為福音的出口，領人到主面前的橋樑。 聖誕前夕，十二月廿四日星期三晚，教會分別在Milpitas主堂和 San Leandro分堂舉行聖誕前夕敬拜，前者七時半開始，後者則在八點鐘舉行。鼓勵弟兄姊妹邀請親友一同出席參加崇拜。 二零二六年一月十日，星期六下午二時卅分，我們將於 San Leandro分堂舉行全教會領袖大會，請所有堂會的教牧同工、事工領袖和生命小組組長預留時間出席參加。 馬利亞說：我心尊主為大；我靈以神我的救主為樂⋯⋯那有權能的，為我成就了大事；他的名為聖。他憐憫敬畏他的人，直到世世代代。（路加福音 1: 46-47， 49-50） 招牧師 **後記： 前文有關十二月在紐約市舉行的『耶穌降生花車大遊行』，令我十分興奮。我撰寫前曾查詢谷歌 (Google)，並找到在五月已有一個『耶穌是主』的花車遊行。後來，有人告訴我這是人工智能製作。於是我又問谷歌『耶穌降生花車大遊行』是否人工智能製作，得到的答案是NO，乃真人騷。這真令我感到有點糊塗，這視頻到底是真是假？無論如何，這提醒我自己不要道聽途說，必須再三查證，不要隨便把看見、聽到的消息傳遞，要學習和操練自己辨別的能力。 不過，我很希望這個視頻是真的，因為它將聖誕節的焦點帶回到耶穌身上，耶穌是聖誕節的主角，祂的降生讓普世歡樂，因祂帶給人有在天國生活的盼望。而我們已經信主的人，正是能幫助人認識神，指引人進入天國的渠道。 代禱事項 讚美並感謝神顧念我們人的軟弱和失敗，差遣祂的獨子耶穌到我們當中，降生成為人的樣子，將盼望與平安帶給人。求神讓我們常存感恩的心，珍惜祂對我們的愛，學習報恩。 為星期三晚分別在Milpitas 和San Leandro舉行的聖誕前夕聯合崇拜祈禱。讓弟兄姊妹能在敬拜中能重溫救主耶穌誕生帶給我們的意義，提醒我們應如何在世上為祂而活，使祂被更多人尊崇。 為在旅途中的弟兄姊妹和他們的家祈禱。求神保守他們在路上的平安，並讓他們能重新得力，在家庭、工作和教會的事奉上盡忠，使神得榮耀。 為Tracy分堂來年的發展祈禱。求神指引弟兄姊妹如何拓展分堂事工，並賜智慧和所需的人力資源，幫忙參與服事。 為半島分堂急切需要帶領敬拜的同工祈禱。求神感動和預備合適的弟兄姊妹參與敬拜的事奉。 奉獻簡報 每月預算目標 […]
posts.content:
牧人心語

這個星期四就是聖誕節。在過去的星期五，在紐約市舉行了一個耶穌降生的花車大遊行；而在今年五月，紐約市已經舉行了一個名為『耶穌是主』的花車大遊行**。我和師母在YouTube觀看了一會，發覺花車的設計、陣容和所傳遞的信息，都令我們讚嘆不已。但最令我驚訝的，是這兩個花車遊行，竟能在極自由開放如紐約市的地方舉行，而且做到有聲有色，街道兩旁都擠滿了，是教會離開安全舒坦區，走到街外傳福音的一個美好見證。

商場佈道，Let’s Go 123於上星期六完成了今年最後一次活動，我為那些經常參加的弟兄姊妹感恩，因為他們也是願意走出自己的安全舒坦區，去到人群當中去分享信仰、傳揚福音，並引領了很多人信主。我是多麼希望有更多弟兄姊妹參加這個活動，習慣隨時隨地與人分享信仰，成為福音的出口，領人到主面前的橋樑。

聖誕前夕，十二月廿四日星期三晚，教會分別在Milpitas主堂和 San Leandro分堂舉行聖誕前夕敬拜，前者七時半開始，後者則在八點鐘舉行。鼓勵弟兄姊妹邀請親友一同出席參加崇拜。

二零二六年一月十日，星期六下午二時卅分，我們將於 San Leandro分堂舉行全教會領袖大會，請所有堂會的教牧同工、事工領袖和生命小組組長預留時間出席參加。

馬利亞說：我心尊主為大；我靈以神我的救主為樂⋯⋯那有權能的，為我成就了大事；他的名為聖。他憐憫敬畏他的人，直到世世代代。（路加福音 1: 46-47， 49-50）

招牧師

**後記：

前文有關十二月在紐約市舉行的『耶穌降生花車大遊行』，令我十分興奮。我撰寫前曾查詢谷歌 (Google)，並找到在五月已有一個『耶穌是主』的花車遊行。後來，有人告訴我這是人工智能製作。於是我又問谷歌『耶穌降生花車大遊行』是否人工智能製作，得到的答案是NO，乃真人騷。這真令我感到有點糊塗，這視頻到底是真是假？無論如何，這提醒我自己不要道聽途說，必須再三查證，不要隨便把看見、聽到的消息傳遞，要學習和操練自己辨別的能力。

不過，我很希望這個視頻是真的，因為它將聖誕節的焦點帶回到耶穌身上，耶穌是聖誕節的主角，祂的降生讓普世歡樂，因祂帶給人有在天國生活的盼望。而我們已經信主的人，正是能幫助人認識神，指引人進入天國的渠道。

代禱事項

  • 讚美並感謝神顧念我們人的軟弱和失敗，差遣祂的獨子耶穌到我們當中，降生成為人的樣子，將盼望與平安帶給人。求神讓我們常存感恩的心，珍惜祂對我們的愛，學習報恩。
  • 為星期三晚分別在Milpitas 和San Leandro舉行的聖誕前夕聯合崇拜祈禱。讓弟兄姊妹能在敬拜中能重溫救主耶穌誕生帶給我們的意義，提醒我們應如何在世上為祂而活，使祂被更多人尊崇。
  • 為在旅途中的弟兄姊妹和他們的家祈禱。求神保守他們在路上的平安，並讓他們能重新得力，在家庭、工作和教會的事奉上盡忠，使神得榮耀。
  • 為Tracy分堂來年的發展祈禱。求神指引弟兄姊妹如何拓展分堂事工，並賜智慧和所需的人力資源，幫忙參與服事。
  • 為半島分堂急切需要帶領敬拜的同工祈禱。求神感動和預備合適的弟兄姊妹參與敬拜的事奉。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37
十一月常費奉獻 $ 274,703.53
十二月常費奉獻 $ 222,225.60
十一月差傳奉獻 $ 2,669.11
十二月差傳奉獻 $ 9,574.93
十一月社區中心奉獻 $ 1,500.00
十二月社區中心奉獻 $ 1,700.00

財政簡報

一月至十月總收入： $ 2,306,708.38
一月至十月總開支： $ 2,731,200.28
一月至十月缺欠： $ 424,491.90

From the Heart of a Shepherd

This Thursday is Christmas. Last Friday, a Nativity parade was held in New York City; and in May, New York City had another parade called “Jesus Is Lord.” My wife and I watched them on YouTube and were amazed by the design, lineup, and messages of the floats. But what surprised me most was that these two parades could be held in such a liberal and open place, New York City, and so successfully, with the streets packed with people. It’s a beautiful testimony of the churches leaving their comfort zones and going out into the streets to share the gospel.

The shopping center evangelistic event, Let’s Go 123, concluded its final activity of the year last Saturday. I give thanks to the brothers and sisters who regularly participate, because they are also willing to step out of their comfort zones, go out into the crowd to share their faith, spread the gospel, and lead many people to Christ. I so hope that more brothers and sisters will participate in this event, making it a habit to share their faith with others anytime, anywhere, making themselves become an outlet for the gospel and a bridge leading people to the Lord.

On the eve of Christmas, Wednesday, December 24th, the church will hold Christmas Eve worship services at the main church in Milpitas and the church campus in San Leandro. The first one will begin at 7:30 PM, and the latter at 8:00 PM. Brothers and sisters are encouraged to invite family and friends to attend.

On Saturday, January 10th, 2026 at 2:30 PM, we will hold a church leadership rally at the San Leandro campus. All pastors, ministry leaders, and life-group leaders from all church campuses are requested to reserve time to attend.

Mary said: “My soul magnifies the Lord; my spirit rejoices in God my Savior… He who is mighty has done great things for me; his name is holy. He has mercy on those who fear him throughout the ages.” (Luke 1:46-47, 49-50)

**Postscript:

I was very excited about the Nativity Parade in New York City in December, as mentioned in the above article. Before writing it, I searched on Google and found a similar parade in May entitled “Jesus is Lord.” Later, someone told me it was AI-generated. So I asked Google again if the Nativity Parade was AI-generated, and the answer was no—it was a live performance. This really confused me; was the video real or fake? In any case, this reminds me not to take what we see and hear lightly, but to verify things repeatedly, and not to casually pass on to others. I need to learn and practice my ability for discernment.

However, I really hope this video is real because it brings the focus of Christmas back to Jesus. Jesus is the protagonist of Christmas; His birth brings joy to the world because He gives people the hope of living in the Kingdom of Heaven. And we, who are already believers, are the channel that helps people know God and guides them into the Kingdom of Heaven.

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise and thank God for His understanding of our weaknesses and failures, sending His only Son Jesus to us, incarnated as a human being, bringing hope and peace to mankind. Pray that God will enable us to always have a grateful heart, cherish His love for us, and learn to repay His kindness.
  • Pray for the Christmas Eve joint worship services to be held Wednesday evening in Milpitas and San Leandro. May our brothers and sisters in Christ revisit the meaning of Christmas, so that we will be reminded on how to live for Jesus in this world, so that He may be honored by many more people.
  • Pray for our brothers and sisters in Christ on the road with their families. Pray that God will keep them safe on their travels and restore their strength so that they will be energized for families, work, and church, bringing glory to God.
  • Pray for the development of the Tracy mission church in the coming year. Pray that God will guide our brothers and sisters on how to develop the ministry and get the wisdom and manpower from God to do the ministry.
  • Pray for the need of worship leaders of the Peninsula mission church. Pray that God will prepare and send the right people to help leading the worship service.

Offerings Summary

Monthly Budget Target $ 485,466.37
Nov. General offering $ 274,703.53
Dec. General offering $ 222,225.60
Nov. Mission offering $ 2,669.11
Dec. Mission offering $ 9,574.93
Nov. Community Center offering $ 1,500.00
Dec. Community Center offering $ 1,700.00

Finance Summary

Jan. to Oct. Income ： $ 2,306,708.38
Jan. to Oct. Expenses ： $ 2,731,200.28
Jan. to Oct. Deficit ： $ 424,491.90

posts.title: 2025-12-14-shepherdsheart
posts.excerpt: 牧人心語 我們上個主日在Milpitas主堂舉行了會員大會，通過了教會執事資格的修訂，理事會的組和明年財政預算等議案。 我要感謝讚美神。因為在會議中，我看到弟兄姊妹對教會的愛、關心與支持，讓整個會員大會像是一個家庭會議一樣。我衷心期待天父爸爸在來年大大賜福教會的事工，讓我們能引領更多人認識並接受耶穌為救主。 另一個讓我高興的原因，是看到弟兄姊妹和教會同工主動開展教會事工。除了已經和大家提及籌組新的生命小組和正在籌劃在Milpitas主堂舉行的祈禱會外，我們今年分別在Milpitas 和 San Leandro都會舉行聖誕前夕敬拜，都是堂會牧者們自發提出的。感謝讚美神。 這個星期日下午在 San Leandro分堂有今年最後一次浸禮，聽說有九個人預備接受浸禮以表明信心。請為他們代禱。 所以，我親愛的弟兄姊妹們，你們務要堅固，不可搖動，常常竭力多做主工；因為知道，你們的勞苦在主裡面不是徒然的。（歌林多前書 15: 58） 招牧師 代禱事項 1. 讚美並感謝神對教會的恩典，使我們無論在任何季節都能繼續為祂結出果實。 2. 為本週日下午將要受浸的弟兄姊妹禱告，願他們藉此表達對主的信心。祈求神堅固他們的信心，裝備他們成為基督的門徒。 3. 為教會禱告，求神供應我們有足夠的資源來發展事工，拓展神的國度。 4. 為陳牧師 (Wilson) 夫婦禱告，他們忠心服事半島分堂的事工。祈求神賜給他們健康和智慧，好讓他們能重組事工團隊的領袖。 5. 為陳志輝牧師夫婦禱告，他們將於本週末結束在香港為期一個月的假期和事工，返回灣區。祈求神幫助他們盡快克服時差，並幫助他們牧養Pleasanton的會眾。 奉獻簡報 每月預算目標 $ […]
posts.content:
牧人心語

我們上個主日在Milpitas主堂舉行了會員大會，通過了教會執事資格的修訂，理事會的組和明年財政預算等議案。

我要感謝讚美神。因為在會議中，我看到弟兄姊妹對教會的愛、關心與支持，讓整個會員大會像是一個家庭會議一樣。我衷心期待天父爸爸在來年大大賜福教會的事工，讓我們能引領更多人認識並接受耶穌為救主。

另一個讓我高興的原因，是看到弟兄姊妹和教會同工主動開展教會事工。除了已經和大家提及籌組新的生命小組和正在籌劃在Milpitas主堂舉行的祈禱會外，我們今年分別在Milpitas 和 San Leandro都會舉行聖誕前夕敬拜，都是堂會牧者們自發提出的。感謝讚美神。

這個星期日下午在 San Leandro分堂有今年最後一次浸禮，聽說有九個人預備接受浸禮以表明信心。請為他們代禱。

所以，我親愛的弟兄姊妹們，你們務要堅固，不可搖動，常常竭力多做主工；因為知道，你們的勞苦在主裡面不是徒然的。（歌林多前書 15: 58）

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 1. 讚美並感謝神對教會的恩典，使我們無論在任何季節都能繼續為祂結出果實。
  • 2. 為本週日下午將要受浸的弟兄姊妹禱告，願他們藉此表達對主的信心。祈求神堅固他們的信心，裝備他們成為基督的門徒。
  • 3. 為教會禱告，求神供應我們有足夠的資源來發展事工，拓展神的國度。
  • 4. 為陳牧師 (Wilson) 夫婦禱告，他們忠心服事半島分堂的事工。祈求神賜給他們健康和智慧，好讓他們能重組事工團隊的領袖。
  • 5. 為陳志輝牧師夫婦禱告，他們將於本週末結束在香港為期一個月的假期和事工，返回灣區。祈求神幫助他們盡快克服時差，並幫助他們牧養Pleasanton的會眾。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37

十一月社區中心奉獻 $ 1,500.00
十二月社區中心奉獻 $ 0.00

財政簡報

一月至十月總收入： $ 2,306,708.38
一月至十月總開支： $ 2,731,200.28
一月至十月缺欠： $ 424,491.90

From the Heart of a Shepherd

Last Sunday, we held our general membership meeting at the Milpitas main Campus, passing resolutions including revisions to the qualifications of church deacons, the formation of the church council, and next year’s budget.

I want to thank and praise God. During the meeting, I saw the love, care, and support of the brothers and sisters have for the church, making the entire membership meeting like a family meeting. I sincerely hope that our Heavenly Father will greatly bless the church’s ministry next year, enabling us to lead more people to know and accept Jesus as their Savior and Lord.

Another reason that makes me happy is seeing brothers, sisters, and church staff proactively organizing church ministry. Besides forming new life group and the prayer meeting we’re planning to hold at the Milpitas main campus, the campus pastors proposed to have Christmas Eve worship services this year at both the Milpitas and San Leandro campuses.

This Sunday afternoon, we will have the last baptism of the year at the San Leandro campus. I heard that nine people are preparing to be baptized to express their faith publicly. Please pray for them.

Therefore, my dear brothers and sisters, be steadfast and immovable, always abounding in the work of the Lord, knowing that your labor in the Lord is not in vain. (1 Corinthians 15:58)

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise and thank God for His grace upon the Church that we continue to bear fruits for Him in season and not in season.
  • Pray for the brothers and sisters in Christ who are going to express their faith in the Lord this Sunday afternoon through baptism. Pray that their faith will be strengthened and equipped to become the disciples of Christ.
  • Pray for God’s provision to the Church that we would have enough resources to do ministry and expand the kingdom of God.
  • Pray for Pastor and Mrs. Wilson Chan as they are faithfully helping out the ministry of the Peninsula Campus. Pray for good health and wisdom to re-group the leaders for the ministry.
  • Pray for Pastor and Mrs. Thomas Chan as they will come back to the Bay Area this weekend after a month-long vacation and ministry in Hong Kong. Pray that they can recover quickly from jet lag and help shepherd our folks in Pleasanton.

posts.content:
牧人心語

聖誕節來了。不知大家是否已經計劃好如何過聖誕節呢？

師母喜歡聖誕節那種熱閙和充滿喜樂、盼望的氣氛。所以為了討她歡心，我在百忙中仍要抽時間把家居和前院佈置好，預備和弟兄姊妹們一起慶聖誕。

我很希望當我們和家人、朋友、主內的弟兄一起慶祝聖誕的時候，不要把聖誕節的主角放在一旁。聖誕節的主角就是道成了肉身、誕生在人世間的耶穌基督。籌算一下如何能讓耶穌基督在我們的聚會中被尊崇和得榮耀。

我們將在這個星期日，十二月七日下午二時卅分，在Milpitas主堂舉行會員大會，請會員提早到場，領取選票，一同商討聖工。

我們計劃在十二月十四日在 San Leandro 分堂舉行浸禮。時間為下午二時卅分。請各分堂牧師鼓勵已決志者盡快報名參加，以表明相信耶穌基督的決心。

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 感謝讚美神，讓聖誕節提醒我們神的愛是多麼偉大，我們人在基督耶穌裡有得救的盼望，在面對人生的挑戰時仍有平安。
  • 為在星期日，十二月七日舉行的年終會員大會祈禱。求聖靈掌管我們的心，讓我們能同心合意，建立一個能榮耀上帝的教會。
  • 為預備接受浸禮的弟兄姊妹祈禱。求神幫助這些弟兄姊妹能藉此堅固他們的信心，屬靈生命繼續成長。
  • 為恩美傳道及黃正傳道代禱。恩美傳道將於明年主力發展Pleasanton 及Tracy 的國語事工。黃正傳道則專注在Milpitas的國語堂事奉。求神幫助弟兄姊妹能盡量配合，讓這幾個堂會的國語事工能健康地成長。
  • 為各個分堂和聚會點的聖誕節活動代禱。讓每個活動都能感受到「以馬內利」，就是神與我們同在。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37
十月常費奉獻 $ 201,061.91
十一月常費奉獻 $ 274,703.53
十月差傳奉獻 $ 3,103.05
十一月差傳奉獻 $ 2,669.11
十月社區中心奉獻 $ 0.00
十一月社區中心奉獻 $ 1,500.00

財政簡報

一月至十月總收入： $ 2,306,708.38
一月至十月總開支： $ 2,731,200.28
一月至十月缺欠： $ 424,491.90

From the Heart of a Shepherd

Christmas is coming. Have you all made plans for Christmas?

My wife loves the lively, joyful, and hopeful atmosphere of Christmas. So, to please her, I’ve taken time out of my busy schedule to decorate the house and front yard, preparing to celebrate Christmas with the brothers and sisters in Christ.

I sincerely hope that when we celebrate Christmas with family, friends, and brothers in Christ in Christ, we don’t leave the protagonist of Christmas aside. The protagonist of Christmas is Jesus Christ, the Word made flesh and born into the world. Let’s consider how to ensure that Jesus Christ is honored and glorified in our gatherings.

We will be holding a general membership meeting this Sunday, December 7th, at 2:30 PM at the Milpitas main campus. Members are requested to arrive early to collect their ballots and discuss our ministry.

We plan to hold a baptism on December 14th at the San Leandro campus at 2:30 PM. Pastors of each campus are requested to encourage those who have made a decision to follow Christ to register as soon as possible, demonstrating their faith in Jesus Christ through baptism.

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise be to God that Christmas reminds us of the greatness of His love, that we have the hope of salvation in Christ Jesus, and that we still have peace in the face of life’s challenges.
  • Pray for the year-end membership meeting to be held on Sunday, December 7th. At the Milpitas Campus. Ask the Holy Spirit to guide our hearts, that we may be of one mind and build a church that glorifies God.
  • Pray for the brothers and sisters in Christ preparing for baptism. Ask God to help strengthen the faith of these people so that they may continue to grow spiritually.
  • Pray for Pastor En-mei and Pastor Zheng Huang. Pastor En-mei will focus on developing the Mandarin ministry in Pleasanton and Tracy next year. Pastor Huang will focus on the Mandarin ministry in Milpitas. Ask God to help the brothers and sisters to work closely with them as much as possible so that the Mandarin ministry in these campuses can grow healthily.
  • Pray for the Christmas activities at all campuses and mission points. Let every activity feel “Emmanuel,” which means God is with us.

Offerings Summary

Monthly Budget Target $ 485,466.37
Oct. General offering $ 201,061.91
Nov. General offering $ 274,703.53
Oct. Mission offering $ 3,103.05
Nov. Mission offering $ 2,669.11
Oct. Community Center offering $ 0.00
Nov. Community Center offering $ 1,500.00

Jan. to Oct. Income ： $ 2,306,708.38
Jan. to Oct. Expenses ： $ 2,731,200.28

posts.content:
牧人心語

在這個感恩季節，我們除了感謝神使我們生活無缺，兒女成才，家庭幸福，出入平安，我們還有甚麼應該感謝神呢？

我要感謝神，因祂不單賜我生命氣息，更給我機會去服事祂；我要感謝神，因祂不以我為卑微，叫我去牧養祂的羊（人）；我要感謝神，因祂在我軟弱時加我力量；在我困惑時讓我看見曙光；在我氣餒時多方鼓勵我；在我疲倦時可以重新得力；在我高興時不要驕傲，在我成功時知道將榮耀歸給神。

我要感謝神，因祂經常給我驚喜。在過去這幾天，有弟兄打電話給我，說神感動他要在教會裡開一個新小組，邀請那些仍未參加小組的弟兄姊妹參加。另外有個姊妹和她的小組代表分享，希望能在崇拜前開一個祈禱會，為崇拜和教會祈禱。當我打電話邀請一些被教會理事會提名的弟兄姊妹參與明年的服事時，有個弟兄跟我說，只要教會有需要，他必定會幫忙；另一個跟我說，我和她分享教會需要，叫她回去祈禱，她說第二天已經回覆了我說OK。我還以為她是說會考慮，原來她是說YES，她願意幫忙服事。

主內的弟兄姊妹、匯點人，你說我怎能不感恩。我再次有一種在家裡和弟兄姊妹一起服事那種溫馨的感覺。匯點是我屬靈的家，也是大家屬靈的家，絕對不是一個購物商場。讓我們一起來建立這個家，將愛、溫暖、安慰和盼望帶給每個來到我們當中敬拜上帝的人。

我們將在十二月七日下午二時卅分，在Milpitas主堂舉行會員大會，依章公告會員，敬請會員依時出席。屆時將討論：

修定會章中的執事資格和教會理事會成員；

選舉教會信託委員；

通過 2026 年教會財政預算；並

通過由理事會選舉首批教會執事給會員投票通過等議案。

這星期日，十一月卅日下午二時，我們將在Milpitas 分堂舉行粵語 101課。歡迎想多認識匯點教會，已決志信主的基督徒及考慮加入教會的弟兄姊妹出席參加。

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 為我們這個屬靈的家感恩。求天父繼續保守和帶領教會的前路，讓教會能跟隨神在這末世完成祂交給我們的任務。
  • 為香港大埔發生的超級火災祈禱。聽說已經有幾十人死亡，很多人失去至親和自己的家園。求天父安慰落在苦難中的人，也求神讓政府能盡快撫恤和救濟受害者，讓他們的生活能早日回復正常。
  • 為預備加入教會和接受浸禮的弟兄姊妹祈禱。求神幫助這些弟兄姊妹在聖靈帶領下選擇以匯點為家，與其他弟兄姊妹一起完成神給我們的託付。
  • 為下主日下午的會員大會祈禱。求神讓弟兄姊妹能同心合意，一齊作出合乎神心意的決定，讓教會繼續迎向光明，走上神為我們預備的道路。
  • 為教會弟兄姊妹能學曉常常以感謝為祭獻給神。並不是單用說話去感謝，更學曉用自己的生命、時間、精力去服事愛我們的神。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37
十月常費奉獻 $ 201,061.91
十一月常費奉獻 $ 242,991.23
 
十月差傳奉獻 $ 3,103.05
十一月差傳奉獻 $ 1,246.28
 
十月社區中心奉獻 $ 0.00
十一月社區中心奉獻 $ 1,500.00

財政簡報

一月至十月總收入： $ 2,306,708.38
一月至十月總開支： $ 2,731,200.28
一月至十月缺欠： $ 424,491.90

From the Heart of a Shepherd

In this season of thanksgiving, besides thanking God for our abundant life, successful children, happy families, and safe travels, what else should we thank Him for?

I thank God that He not only gave me life but also the opportunity to serve Him; I thank God that He does not consider me lowly but calls me to shepherd His sheep; I thank God that He strengthens me when I am weak, shows me the light when I am confused, encourages me in many ways when I am discouraged, renews my strength when I am weary, and prevents me from being proud when I am happy, and knows to give glory to God when I succeed.

I thank God that He often surprises me. In the past few days, a brother called me, saying that God moved him to start a new life group in the church and invite those brothers and sisters who haven’t yet joined one. Another sister shared with her small group representative that she hoped to start a prayer meeting before worship service to pray for the worship and the church. When I called to invite some brothers and sisters nominated by the church council to participate in next year’s ministry, one brother told me he would definitely help if the church needed him; another told me that after I shared the church’s needs with her and asked her to pray about it, she replied the next day saying “OK.” I thought she meant she would consider it, but actually she meant “YES,” she was willing to help with ministry.

Brothers and sisters in Christ, members of Crosspoint Church, how can I not be grateful? I once again felt that warm feeling of serving together with brothers and sisters at home. Crosspoint is my spiritual home, and it is also the spiritual home of everyone in the church. It is definitely not a shopping mall. Let us build this home together, bringing love, warmth, comfort, and hope to everyone who to worship God.

We will hold a membership meeting on December 7th at 2:30 PM in the Milpitas main campus. This is announced to all members according according to the church bylaws, and we kindly request everyone to attend. The meeting will discuss:

1. Revising the qualifications of deacons and the members of the church council in our bylaws;

2. Electing church trustees;

3. Approving the 2026 church budget; and

4. Approving the motion to elect the first batch of church deacons for church members to vote for at a membership meeting.

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Give thanks for our spiritual family. We pray that Our Heavenly Father will continue to protect and guide the church on its road, enabling it to follow God in fulfilling the mission He has given us in these last days.
  • Pray for the devastating fire in Tai Po, Hong Kong. We have heard that dozens have died, and many have lost loved ones and their homes. We pray that Our Heavenly Father will comfort those in suffering, and that God will enable the government provides swift relief and compensation to the victims, allowing their lives to return to normal as soon as possible.
  • Pray for the brothers and sisters preparing to join the church or be baptized. We pray that God will help these brothers and sisters, under the guidance of the Holy Spirit, to choose Crosspoint as their home, and fulfill the mission God has entrusted to us.
  • Pray for the membership meeting next Sunday afternoon. We pray that God will enable the brothers and sisters to be of one mind and make decisions that are in accordance with God’s will, allowing the church to continue to walk the path God has prepared for us.
  • Pray that the brothers and sisters in the church will learn to offer thanksgiving often as a sacrifice to God. It’s not just about expressing gratitude verbally, but also about learning to serve our loving God with our lives, time, and energy.

Offerings Summary

Monthly Budget Target $ 485,466.37
Oct. General offering $ 201,061.91
十 Jan. General offering $ 242,991.23
 
Oct. Mission offering $ 3,103.05
十 Jan. Mission offering $ 1,246.28

posts.content:
牧人心語

昨天和一個對很久沒有見面的教會夫婦相聚，分享過去在主裡所經歷的恩典與祝福，竟談了四個小時。我們談了很多東西，但其中令我印象最深刻的，是這個弟兄對我說，他用了前五十年努力去工作賺錢養家，他才五十出頭，當然仍要工作，但他想用以後的五十年多做點不一樣的事，比如多點時間在教會裡幫忙服事，這樣會令他的人生更有意思。

我為這個弟兄有這樣的想法高興，因他體會到聖經的所說的：「你們要謹慎自守，躲避各樣的貪婪；因為，一個人無論怎樣富裕，他的真生命不在乎他有多少財產。」（路加福音 12:15）

這個弟兄不是十分富裕，但已充足有餘。他感到神已經很祝福他，也在很多事情上保守他和看顧他。他和他妻子很希望能更投入教會，參與教會的服事，更深經歷神。

主內的弟兄姊妹、匯點人，這正是我對大家的期望。我很希望大家能更深體會神的愛和祝福，並樂意將自己的生命，完全交託給愛我們、樂意照顧我們的天父上帝，讓我們能進一步經驗祂的救恩和可以發生在我們身上的神蹟奇事。

我們將在十二月七日下午二時卅分，在Milpitas主堂舉行會員大會，依章公告會員，敬請會員依時出席。屆時將討論：

修定會章中的執事資格和教會理事會成員；

選舉教會信託委員；

通過 2026 年教會財政預算；並

通過由理事會選舉首批教會執事給會員投票通過等議案。

這星期日，十一月廿三日下午二時，我們將在Pleasanton 分堂舉行 101課。下主日則在Milpitas舉行粵語 101課，歡迎已決志信主的基督徒及考慮加入教會者報名參加。

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 感謝神賜給我們諸般恩典。求神幫助我們學識常常喜樂，不住禱告，凡事謝恩。
  • 為感恩節長週末外出的弟兄姊妹祈禱。求賜路上平安，身心舒暢，重新得力。
  • 為教牧同工及教會領袖祈禱。求神賜智慧和能力，引領他們找到合適和樂意事主的義工，組成有效的事工團隊，幫助拓展教會各項事工。
  • 為教會正密識和會見未來教牧人選祈禱。求神賜智慧給教牧同工，讓他們能分辨神的心意，知道神的揀選和預備，將合適的忠僕引薦給教會。
  • 為教會發展所需要的資源祈禱。求天父提醒和教導我們做忠心管家，讓我們的家一無所缺，可以繼續向前邁進，完成神給我們的使命，福音普傳。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37
十月常費奉獻 $ 201,061.91
十一月常費奉獻 $ 184,202.00
 
十月差傳奉獻 $ 3,103.05
十一月差傳奉獻 $ 1,046.28
 
十月社區中心奉獻 $ 0.00
十一月社區中心奉獻 $ 1,500.00

財政簡報

一月至九月總收入： $ 2,040,241.44
一月至九月總開支： $ 2,512,123.97
一月至九月缺欠： $ 471,882.53

From the Heart of a Shepherd

Yesterday, I met with a church couple I had not seen in a long time. We shared the grace and blessings we had experienced in the Lord, and talked for four hours. We talked about many things, but what impressed me most was what this brother told me. He said he spent the first fifty years of his life working hard to earn money and support his family. He is in his early fifties, and of course, he still needs to work, but he wants to spend the next fifty years doing something different, like spending more time helping in church ministry. He believes this will make his life more meaningful.

I was happy for this brother’s thought because he understood what the Bible says: “Be sober-minded and avoid every kind of greed. For a person’s true life does not consist in how much wealth he has.” (Luke 12:15)

This brother is not extremely wealthy, but he has more than enough. He feels that God has already blessed him and protected and cared for him in many ways. He and his wife hope to be more involved in the church, participate in church ministry, and experience God more deeply.

Brothers and sisters in Christ, this is exactly what I hope for you all. I sincerely hope that every one of you can more deeply experience God’s love and blessings, and willingly entrust your lives completely to our loving and caring Heavenly Father, so that you may further experience His salvation and the miracles that can happen to you.

We will hold a membership meeting on December 7th at 2:30 PM in the Milpitas main campus. This is announced to members according to the church bylaws, and we kindly request everyone to attend. The meeting will discuss:

1. Revising the qualifications of deacons and the members of the church council in our bylaws;

2. Electing church trustees;

3. Approving the 2026 church budget; and

4. Approving the motion to elect the first batch of church deacons for church members to vote for at a membership meeting.

This Sunday, November 23rd, at 2:00 PM, we will hold Class 101 at the Pleasanton campus. Next Sunday, we will hold Class 101 in Cantonese at the Milpitas campus. Christians who have decided to believe in Christ, and those considering joining the church are welcome to attend the class.

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • We thank God for all His blessings. Let’s pray that God help us learn to be joyful always, to pray continually, and to give thanks in all circumstances.
  • We pray for our brothers and sisters in Christ traveling during the Thanksgiving long weekend. Let’s pray that they have a safe journey, be refreshed in body and mind, and regain their energy.
  • We pray for our pastors, staff, and church leaders. Let’s pray that God grants them wisdom and ability in finding suitable and willing volunteers to serve the Lord, and to form effective ministry teams to help expand the church’s various ministries.
  • Let’s pray for the church’s search for future pastors. Let’s pray that God grants our pastors and staff wisdom to discern God’s will for His election and preparation, and to introduce suitable and faithful servants to the church.
  • We pray for the resources needed for the church’s development. Lt’s pray that Our Heavenly Father would remind and teach us to be faithful stewards, that our church would lack nothing, and that we can continue to move forward, fulfilling the mission God has given us on spreading the Good News of the Heaven.

Offerings Summary

Monthly Budget Target $ 485,466.37
Oct. General offering $ 201,061.91
Nov. General offering $ 184,202.00
 
Oct. Mission offering $ 3,103.05
Nov. Mission offering $ 1,046.28
 
Oct. Community Center offering $ 0.00
Nov. Community Center offering $ 1,500.00

Finance Summary

Jan. to Sep. Income ： $ 2,040,241.44
Jan. to Sep. Expenses ： $ 2,512,123.97
Jan. to Sep. Deficit ： $ 471,882.53

posts.content:
牧人心語

上星期日，有好幾位弟兄姊妹來對我說：牧師，辛苦你了。我對他們說：我不辛苦，是弟兄姊妹辛苦了。特別是Fred弟兄和他的服事團隊，還有幫忙安排筵席的Iva姊妹和教會辦事處的同工們，負責統籌家庭同樂日的領袖和弟兄姊妹，推動湘海音樂佈道會的國語同工們，還有還有⋯⋯我這樣做太危險了，一定會漏掉一些我應該多謝他們的人，例如我們當中的年輕人。

不過，我絕不能不向天上的父神揚聲感謝和讚美祂的美善。祂看顧並保守自己的教會 25年，並不嫌棄我們的不足和軟弱，願意繼續使用我們，不斷向我們印證祂的同在。就是在我們感恩聚餐當晚，也藉著黃正傳道帶領了一個剛參加Pleasanton聚會不久的姊妹即席決志信主。榮歸真神！

現在各個分堂的教牧同工們正密鑼緊鼓地和他們的義工領袖籌組明年的事奉團隊，並開始計劃明年各個堂會的事工。我們教會在踏入第26年這個轉折點，極需要大家起來一起服事上帝、那位極愛我們的神。

我們將在十一月廿三日在Pleasanton 分堂舉行國語 101課，而粵語的 101課則會在十一月卅日在Milpitas主堂舉行實體上課，時間均為下午二時至四時。請鼓勵已決志信主或考慮加入匯點大家庭的弟兄姊妹報名參加。

這星期日，十一月十六日下午在Milpitas主堂有英語浸禮，歡迎出席觀禮。

凡以感謝獻上為祭的便是榮耀我；那按正路而行的，我必使他得著我的救恩。（詩篇 50:23）

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 感謝神，上週日我們舉行了令人振奮的25週年紀念崇拜，感恩節晚宴也充滿了美好的團契。願神得榮耀，使我們更感恩。
  • 請為新按立的牧師們禱告，願神對他們呼召的肯定激勵他們。祈求神賜給他們異象，使他們能鞏固和發展在匯點教會的事工。
  • 請為所有牧師同工禱告，他們正忙於招募人員擔任不同的事工職位。求神引導他們組成有效的事工團隊，幫助支持和發展各項事工。
  • 請為新信徒和初次來到教會的人禱告，願他們藉著浸禮表達信心，並決定加入教會。
  • 請為半島宣教事工和特雷西宣教事工禱告，他們計劃在感恩節期間有社區外展活動。求神祝福他們，並提供人力和物力。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37
十月常費奉獻 $ 201,061.91
十一月常費奉獻 $ 87,399.50
 
十月差傳奉獻 $ 3,103.05
十一月差傳奉獻 $ 706.28
 
十月社區中心奉獻 $ 0.00
十一月社區中心奉獻 $ 1,500.00

財政簡報

一月至 九月總收入： $ 2,040,241.44
一月至 九月總開支： $ 2,512,123.97
一月至 九月缺欠： $ 471,882.53

From the Heart of a Shepherd

Last Sunday, several brothers and sisters came to me and said, “Pastor, thank you for your hard work.” I told them, “I’m not the one who worked hard; it’s the brothers and sisters in Christ who worked really hard for the special events.” Especially Brother Fred and his ministry team, Sister Iva and the church office staff who helped arrange the banquet, the leaders and their helpers who coordinated the family fun days, the Mandarin-speaking staff who helped promote the Xianghai Evangelistic Concert, and so on… It’s too risky for me to name the people…; I’m bound to forget some people who helped a lot such as the young people whom I should thank.

However, I absolutely cannot fail to proclaim my thanks and praise to God our Father in Heaven for His goodness. He has watched over and protected His church for 25 years, not rejecting our shortcomings and weaknesses, willing to continue using us, and continually confirming His presence to us. Even on the night of our thanksgiving dinner, Pastor Zheng Huang led a sister who had recently attended the Pleasanton worship service to make an impromptu decision to accept Jesus as her Savior. Glory to God!

The pastors and staff of each church campus are currently working diligently with their volunteer leaders to put together ministry teams for next year. And they have begun to planning the ministries for their campus. As our church enters its 26th year, a pivotal moment, we desperately need everyone to rise up together serving the God who loves us so dearly.

We will be holding our Mandarin 101 class on November 23rd at our Pleasanton campus, while the Cantonese 101 class will be held in person on November 30th at our Milpitas main campus, both classes are from 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM. Please encourage brothers and sisters who have decided to believe in the Lord or are considering joining the Crosspoint family to register for attending the class.

This Sunday, November 16th, there will be an English baptism at our Milpitas main church. All are welcome to observe the ceremony.

“He who offers a sacrifice of thanksgiving glorifies me; and to him who walks in the right way, I will bring him to my salvation.” (Psalm 50:23)

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise God for an uplifting 25th anniversary worship service and the great fellowship at the Thanksgiving banquet last Sunday. May God be glorified and make us become more thankful.
  • Pray for the newly ordained pastors that the affirmation for their call from God energized them. Pray that they would receive God’s vision for strengthening and developing their ministry at Crosspoint Church.
  • Pray for all the pastoral staff as they are busy recruiting people to serve at various ministry positions. Ask God to guide them to put together effective ministry teams to help support and develop the ministries.
  • Pray for the new believers and those who are new to the Church that they will express their faith through baptism and decide to join the Church.
  • Pray for the Peninsula Mission and Tracy mission as they have planned to reaching out in their community during the Thanksgiving season. Ask God to bless them and provide manpower and the resources.

Offerings Summary

Monthly Budget Target $ 485,466.37
Oct. General offering $ 201,061.91
十 Jan. General offering $ 87,399.50
 
Oct. Mission offering $ 3,103.05
十 Jan. Mission offering $ 706.28

十 Jan. Community Center offering $ 1,500.00

posts.content:
牧人心語

這星期日，是匯點教會成立 25 週年的感恩崇拜。

廿五年前！神感動聖荷西華人浸信會差派我和師母，帶著 58位弟兄姊妹出來植堂，開始經歷一個不一樣的事奉。

廿五年裡！我看到的是神的同在！祂帶領匯點在Milpitas, Pleasanton, Tracy, Peninsula, and San Leandro 建立堂會，成立福音基地。教會裡的弟兄姊妹，很多都是透過匯點認識主和接受主。已信主的，我看著他們成長，忠心地在不同的堂會服事。在教會的順境和逆境中，我看見神行神蹟，把不可能的變成可能，把困難變成祝福。這是大家有目共睹的。

廿五年過去！我只能說：神是神！我軟弱時祂饒恕我；我動搖時，祂扶持我；我失望時，祂給盼望；我傷心時，祂安慰我。祂提醒我耶穌也曾為我受苦、受凌辱。

這一切一切，很多弟兄姊妹和我一起經歷。無論你在匯點的日子有多久，你的出現和參與都有神的心意和安排。既是這樣，讓我們一起回應這廿五年神的恩典。

讓我們同聲說：我在這裡，請差遣我！

這星期日，請大家早一點到在Milpitas的主堂參加下午三點鐘開始的感恩崇拜，除教會的停車場外，教會附近的街道均可停泊車輛。

感恩崇拜暨按牧典禮用單語進行，我們將在 104室有粵語即時傳譯，國語傳譯則按排在 Hub 裡面進行。兒童將有專人照顧。

我鼓勵匯點人穿著記念T恤，外加外套參與敬拜聚會和晚宴 。崇拜後有全體大合照，然後前往半島豪苑酒樓晚宴。

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 讚美神的安排，在十月卅一日給我們有好的天氣，在San Leandro分堂停車場舉行嘉年華會，有數百人出席參加，與眾多社區人士同樂，和他們建立關係。求神讓我們在各個社區中建立良好的名聲，能見證神的美善。
  • 為教會成立 25 週年感恩。求神繼續使用我們教會能成為人與神的交匯點，將更多人帶到神施恩的寶座面前，祈求神的憐憫、醫治和拯救。
  • 為容旭輝傳道和Caleb Hankin傳道祈禱。他們這星期日將被按立為牧師，全心全意服事獨一真神。祈求神保守他們的心志，並加添他們愛神愛人的心，引領更多人信主並成為像主的門徒。
  • 為按立執事籌備委員會和修章委員會祈禱。他們將於星期六晚舉行聯合會議，協調修章和按立執事的相關細則。求神賜智慧，並引領他們作合神心意的決定。
  • 為各堂點正籌組明年義工團隊祈禱。求神感動更多人願意起來事奉上帝，建立能榮耀神的教會。

財政簡報

一月至 九月總收入： $ 2,040,241.44
一月至 九月總開支： $ 2,512,123.97
一月至 九月缺欠： $ 471,882.53

From the Heart of a Shepherd

This Sunday is the 25th anniversary of Crosspoint Church. We will have a Thanksgiving worship service in the afternoon.

Twenty-five years ago! God moved the Chinese Baptist Church of San Jose to send my wife and me, along with 58 brothers and sisters, to plant a church in Milpitas. We began a different ministry journey.

In these twenty-five years! I have witnessed God’s presence! He led Crosspoint to establish churches and evangelistic bases in Milpitas, Pleasanton, Tracy, Peninsula, and San Leandro. Many brothers and sisters in Christ came to know and accept the Lord through Crosspoint. Those who have already believed have grown, faithfully serving in different church campuses. In the church’s good times and bad, I have seen God perform miracles, turning the impossible into possible, and difficulties into blessings. This is evident to all.

Twenty-five years have passed! I can only say: God is Good! When I was weak, He forgave me; when I wavered, He upheld me; when I was disappointed, He gave me hope; when I was heartbroken, He comforted me. He reminded me that Jesus also suffered and was humiliated for me.

Many brothers and sisters have experienced all of this with me. No matter how long you’ve been at Crosspoint Church, your presence and participation are all in accordance with God’s will and plan. Therefore, let us respond to God’s grace over these twenty-five years, and say to Him in unity: Here I am, send me.

_______________

Please arrive early at our main church campus in Milpitas for the Thanksgiving service starting at 3:00 PM. Parking is also available on the streets near the church.

The Thanksgiving service and ordination ceremony will be conducted in a single language. Cantonese interpretation will be available in Room 104, while Mandarin interpretation will be arranged in the Hub. Child-care will be provided.

We encourage Crosspoint members to wear commemorative T-shirts and jackets to the worship service. After the service, there will be a group photo, followed by dinner at the Pearl Harbor Peninsula Grand Restaurant in Milpitas.

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise be to God for His arrangement of good weather on October 31st, allowing us to hold a carnival in the parking lot of our San Leandro church campus, attended by hundreds of people, enjoying time with many community folks and building relationships with them. Pray that God will grant us a good reputation in our communities, enabling us to witness to His goodness.
  • Give thanks for the church’s 25th anniversary. Pray that God will continue to use our church as a meeting point between people and God, bringing more people to the throne of His grace. Let’s pray for God’s mercy, healing, and salvation.
  • Pray for Pastors Sam Yung and Caleb Hankin. They will be ordained this Sunday, serving the one true God wholeheartedly. Pray that God will protect their hearts and strengthen their love for God and people, leading more people to faith and becoming disciples like Him.
  • Pray for the Ordination Committee and the Bylaw Committee. They will hold a joint meeting on Saturday evening to coordinate the details of bylaw revision and ordination process. Pray that God will grant them wisdom and guide them to make decisions that are pleasing to Him.
  • Pray for the recruitment of volunteer teams for each church campus next year. Pray that God will move more people to step up and serve God, and to build churches that glorify His name.

Finance Summary

Jan. to Sep. Income ： $ 2,040,241.44
Jan. to Sep. Expenses ： $ 2,512,123.97
Jan. to Sep. Deficit ： $ 471,882.53

posts.content:
牧人心語

這星期三，我和三位國語同工一起開會，檢討音樂佈道會和跟進初信者的工作。我要感謝讚美上帝，因為祂賜給我們教會幾位願意盡心盡意服事祂的教牧同工。他們也為著上週神如何藉著音樂會祝福和建立我們的國語事工而感到興奮。

我們將在下一個主日，十一月九日下午三點鐘，在Milpitas主堂舉行教會成立 25週年的感恩崇拜暨按立牧師典禮。十一月八日在Tracy和十一月九日上午各個分堂的崇拜將會取消，請大家一起回來參加星期日下午的感恩崇拜。會後在半島豪苑酒樓有感恩聚餐，位置有限，於十一月二日截止報名。

回想過去這 25年，實在是百感交集。總括一句，匯點教會是神以大能和無比智慧建立的教會；而我和師母有幸見證她的誕生、成長和轉化。祂偉大和奇妙的作為，經常在我們教會當中顯現。

願你的作為向你僕人顯現；願你的榮耀向他們子孫顯明。（詩篇 90: 6）阿們！阿們！誠心所願！

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 讚美神賜給我們有忠心、願意付出的教牧同工服事教會。求神加添他們智慧和力量，能同心合意為神作大事。
  • 為教會慶祝成立 25 週年的感恩崇拜和按牧典禮的籌備工作祈禱。求神讓這些活動成為教會的祝福，讓參與者能見證神的作為，歸榮耀與神。
  • 為容旭輝傳道和Caleb Hankin傳道和他們的家庭祈禱。求神讓他們成為教會家庭的榜樣，並大大使用他們拓展我們的兒童、青少年及成人英語事工。
  • 為半島分堂和Tracy 分堂正籌組明年的事奉團隊祈禱。求神帶領和感動更多弟兄姊妹起來事奉祈禱。
  • 為教會的敬拜隊，特別是國語的敬拜隊祈禱。我們需要更多能帶領讚美敬拜的領袖來帶領各堂點的敬拜讚美時間。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37
十月常費奉獻 $ 340,897.12
十一月常費奉獻 $ 201,061.91
 
十月差傳奉獻 $ 3,783.05
十一月差傳奉獻 $ 3,103.05
 
十月社區中心奉獻 $ 3,700.00
十一月社區中心奉獻 $ 0.00

財政簡報

一月至 九月總收入： $ 2,040,241.44
一月至 九月總開支： $ 2,512,123.97
一月至 九月缺欠： $ 471,882.53

From the Heart of a Shepherd

This Wednesday, I met with three Mandarin-speaking colleagues to review the music evangelistic concert and the follow-up work with new believers. I want to thank and praise God for giving our church ministers who are willing to serve Him wholeheartedly. They were excited about how God blessed and built up our Mandarin ministry through the concert last week.

We will be holding a thanksgiving worship service and pastor ordination ceremony next Sunday, November 9th, at 3:00 PM in Milpitas Main Campus. The worship services at Tracy on November 8th and at various church campuses on the morning of November 9th will be cancelled. Please come back to attend the thanksgiving worship service on Sunday afternoon. There will be a thanksgiving dinner afterward at the Harbor Pearl Peninsula Restaurant; space is limited, and registration closes on November 2nd.

Looking back on these 25 years, I am filled with mixed emotions. In short, Crosspoint Church is a church established by God with great power and unparalleled wisdom; and my wife and I have been fortunate to witness its birth, growth, and transformation. God’s great and wondrous works are constantly manifested in our church.

May your works be shown to your servants, and your glory to their children. (Psalm 90:6) Amen! Amen! Indeed, it is my heart’s desire!

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise God for the faithful and dedicated ministers and staff He has given us to serve the church. Pray that God will increase their wisdom and strength so that they may work together in harmony to do great things for God.
  • Pray for the preparations for the church’s 25th anniversary thanksgiving worship service and ordination ceremony. Pray that God will make these events a blessing to the church, allowing participants to witness God’s work and give glory to Him.
  • Pray for Pastors Sam Yung and Caleb Hankin ,and their families. Pray that God will make them role models for church families and greatly utilize their talents to expand our English ministry for children, youth, and adults.
  • Pray for the Peninsula and Tracy campuses as they prepare to form their core ministry teams for next year. Pray that God will lead and inspire more brothers and sisters to rise up in church services and prayer.
  • Pray for the church’s worship teams, especially the Mandarin worship teams. We need more leaders who can lead praise and worship at each church campus.

Offerings Summary

Monthly Budget Target $ 485,466.37
Oct. General offering $ 340,897.12
十 Jan. General offering $ 201,061.91
 
Oct. Mission offering $ 3,783.05
十 Jan. Mission offering $ 3,103.05
 
Oct. Community Center offering $ 3,700.00
十 Jan. Community Center offering $ 0.00

Finance Summary

Jan. to Sep. Income ： $ 2,040,241.44
Jan. to Sep. Expenses ： $ 2,512,123.97
Jan. to Sep. Deficit ： $ 471,882.53

保羅勸勉我們：務要傳道，無論得時不得時，總要專心。即是說無論我們覺得是合適的時候還是不合適的時候，我們都要傳講神的話語和天國的福音。

感謝讚美上帝，星期五晚教會首次舉辦的國語音樂佈道會有 26人決志信主。有一位教會同工告訴師母，我們預備了 26份禮物給決志的新朋友，結果每一份禮物都送出去了，令她感到十分振奮，倦意全消，並將榮耀歸給神。

親愛的弟兄姊妹，天父爸爸是一次又一次地鼓勵我們，祂仍要使用我們，祂會繼續與我們同在，指引我們前面的道路。

這個星期日下午二時卅分，我們將會在Milpitas主堂舉行教會諮詢會議。請關心教會的弟兄姊妹盡量抽空出席參加。

十月卅一日星期五下午五時至晚上八時（不是七時半開始），我們在San Leandro分堂將舉行家庭同樂日，希望能邀請到住在附近的華人家庭來與我們一起享受歡樂時光，並認識我們教會。

教會慶祝成立 25 週年的感恩崇拜暨按立牧師典禮將會在十一月九日下午三時在Milpitas主堂舉行，隨後在半島豪苑海鮮酒樓有感恩晚宴。那個週末在星期六和星期日早上各堂會的敬拜將暫停一次。請大家留意並幫忙提醒其他弟兄姊妹和朋友。

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 讚美神，國語音樂佈道會有 26人決志信主。祈求天父鞏固他們的信心，讓他們能體驗到神的看顧與幫助，天天追求與神親近。
  • 為慶祝教會成立 25 週年的感恩崇拜和聚餐的籌備工作祈禱。求神加添籌備同工們的智慧與精神，讓所有籌備工作都能按時完成。
  • 為十月卅一日在San Leandro舉行的家庭同樂日祈禱。求主賜合宜天氣，並引領更多住在附近的華人家庭出席參加。
  • 為各位教牧同工正積極尋找合適的新同工加入事奉團隊祈禱。求神差遣合適的工人到我們當中，與現時的教牧團隊一起配搭事奉神。
  • 為籌組明年的義工事奉團隊祈禱。求神感動更多弟兄姊妹起來幫忙發展教會事工。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37
九月常費奉獻 $ 340,897.12
十月常費奉獻 $ 159,180.02
九月差傳奉獻 $ 3,783.05
十月差傳奉獻 $ 2,706.28
九月社區中心奉獻 $ 3,700.00
十月社區中心奉獻 $ 0.00

財政簡報

一月至八月總收入： $ 1,634,810.77
一月至八月總開支： $ 2,314,846.32
一月至八月缺欠： $ 680,035.55

From the Heart of a Shepherd

Paul exhorts us: “Preach the word; be ready in season and out of season.” This means that whether we feel it’s the right time or not the right time, we should preach God’s Word and the gospel of the Heaven.

Thank God that 26 people made decisions for Christ at our first Mandarin music evangelistic concert on Friday night. A church staff member told my wife that we had prepared 26 gifts for the new believers, and every one of them was given away. The number was just right. She was deeply excited, and her fatigue melted away. She gave all the glory to God.

Dear brothers and sisters in Christ, our Heavenly Father encouraged us time after time that He still wants to use us. He will continue to be with us, guiding our path forward.

This Sunday at 2:30 PM, we will hold a church town hall meeting at our main campus in Milpitas. Brothers and sisters who care about the church, please make time to attend.

On Friday, October 31st, from 5:00 PM to 8:00 PM (NOT 7:30), we will hold a Family Fun Day at our San Leandro campus. We hope to invite nearby Chinese families to enjoy a happy time with us and get to know our church.

The church’s 25th anniversary thanksgiving service and ordination ceremony will be held at 3:00 PM on November 9th at the Milpitas main church, followed by a thanksgiving dinner at Peninsula Garden Seafood Restaurant. There will be no worship services at all campuses on Saturday and Sunday mornings that weekend. Please take note and help remind other brothers and sisters in Christ, and other regular attendees.

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise God! 26 people made decisions for Christ during the Mandarin Music Evangelistic Concert. Pray that our Heavenly Father will strengthen their faith, allowing them to experience His care and help, and pursue a closer relationship with Him daily.
  • Pray for the preparations for the thanksgiving service and dinner to celebrate the church’s 25th anniversary. Pray that God will grant wisdom and strength to the organizers so that all preparations can be completed on time.
  • Pray for the Family Fun Day to be held in San Leandro on October 31st. Pray for favorable weather and for more Chinese families living nearby to attend.
  • Pray for the pastoral staff who are actively seeking suitable new staff to join the ministry team. Pray that God will send suitable workers to us to serve God alongside the current pastoral team.
  • Pray for the recruitment of the volunteer ministry team for next year. Pray that God will call more brothers and sisters in Christ to help develop the church’s ministries.

posts.content:
牧人心語

我今早在聖靈感動底下，在 Tracy崇拜講完道之後帶領了一個慕道友決志信主。我要感謝讚美神，因祂不單感動我和他分享福音，邀請他決志信主，更因此讓我從新得力，將身心的疲憊一掃而空。

過去這兩三週，我和其他幾位教牧同工，還有從教會外請來的資深牧者，約見了容旭輝和Caleb Hankin傳道，亦約見了一兩位求職的教牧同工。感謝讚美主， Caleb Hankin傳道已通過按牧團的考核，這星期日開始根據會章規定公告全會眾三個星期。如無異議，將與容旭輝傳道一起在十一月九日被按立為牧師。

八月中成立的按立執事籌備委員會和教會會章修訂委員會亦已開始運作，並將會在十月廿六日在Milpitas舉行的諮詢會議中分享進程。時間為下午二時卅分，會議不設直播。按立執事籌備委員將於本星期日在各堂點張貼執事的資格和要求，歡迎弟兄姊妹查閱。

這星期日十二時卅分至三時卅分，在 Milpitas主堂將舉行家庭同樂日，聽說已有四百人報名參加。這是一個接觸社區，邀請新朋友認識教會的好機會。Milpitas主堂的年青人，將擔綱負責各個不同的活動。我們為他們的成長感謝讚美神，他們也需要家長和眾弟兄姊妹的鼓勵和支持。

首次國語音樂佈道會將於十月廿四日星期五晚七點半鐘在Milpitas主堂舉行。幫忙採排的弟兄告訴我，湘海弟兄的音樂會十分專業，內容豐富並多元化，請把握機會邀請親友、同事出席參加。

我們傳揚他，是用諸般的智慧，勸戒各人，教導各人，要把各人在基督裡完完全全地引到神面前。（歌羅西書 1: 28）和合

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 讚美感謝神，因祂仍要使用我們教會去傳福音，領中歸主，把社區裡的人引帶到神面前，讓他們有機會聽信天國的福音。
  • 感謝神讚美神對容旭輝傳道和Caleb Hankin傳道的呼召。求神藉著按牧典禮鼓勵他們更努力去完成他們的召命，幫助更多人信主並成为耶穌基督的門徒。
  • 為這星期日在Milpitas主堂舉行的家庭同樂日祈禱。求神加力並保守負責的弟兄姊妹和年曇人，讓他們有平安和事奉神的喜樂；又讓我們能藉此吸引更多人到教會中。
  • 為 2026年的義工選舉祈禱。求神幫助各教牧同工帶領和堂點的領袖提名合適人選，參與和推動明年各個教會事工。
  • 為首次舉辦的聯合國語/普通話音樂佈道會祈禱。求神使用這聚會吸引更多說普通話/國語的朋友到教會來聽音樂和認識神在人生命中的工作。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37
九月常費奉獻 $ 340,897.12
十月常費奉獻 $ 94,415.28
 
九月差傳奉獻 $ 3,783.05
十月差傳奉獻 $ 2,706.28
 
九月社區中心奉獻 $ 3,700.00
十月社區中心奉獻 $ 0.00

財政簡報

一月至八月總收入： $ 1,634,810.77
一月至八月總開支： $ 2,314,846.32
一月至八月缺欠： $ 680,035.55

From the Heart of a Shepherd

This morning, moved by the Holy Spirit, I led a seeker to make a decision to accept Christ as his Savior after Tracy’s worship service. I want to thank and praise God, for He not only moved me to share the gospel with him and invite him to make a decision for Christ, He also renewed my strength, and swept away my physical and mental fatigue.

Over the previous weeks, I, along with other pastoral staff members, and a few senior pastors we brought in, have met with Pastors Sam Yung and Caleb Hankin, as well as one or two other ministers seeking employment. Thankfully, Pastor Caleb Hankin has passed the ordination committee’s examination and will be announced to the congregation for three weeks, beginning this Sunday If there are no objections, he will be ordained as a pastor alongside Pastor Sam Yung on November 9th.

The Deacon Ordination Planning Committee and the Church Constitution and Bylaw Revision Committee, established in mid-August, have begun their work and will share their progress at the town hall meeting in Milpitas on October 26th. The meeting will be held at 2:30 PM and will not be livestreamed. The planning committee will post the qualifications and requirements for deacons at each church campus this Sunday. Brothers and sisters are welcome to review them.

This Sunday, a Family Fun Day will be held at the Milpitas Main Campus from 12:30 to 3:30 PM. We have heard that 400 people have already signed up. This is a great opportunity to connect with the community and invite new friends to the church. Young people from the Milpitas Campus will lead various activities. We thank and praise God for their growth, yet they need the encouragement and support of their parents and fellow church members.

The first Mandarin music evangelistic meeting will be held at the Milpitas Main Campus on Friday, October 24th, at 7:30 PM. The staff who helped with the rehearsal told me that Brother Xianghai’s concert is very professional, with rich and diverse content. Please take advantage of this opportunity to invite friends, family, and colleagues to the concert.

The Bible says: We proclaim him, admonishing and teaching everyone with all wisdom, so that we may present everyone perfect in Christ. (Colossians 1:28)

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise and thank God that He continues to use our church to preach the gospel, lead people to the Church, and bring people to God, giving them the opportunity to hear the gospel of the Kingdom.
  • Thank and praise God for His calling of Ministers Sam Yung and Caleb Hankin. Pray that through their ordination, God will encourage them to strive even harder to fulfill their callings, helping more people to believe in the Lord and become disciples of Jesus Christ.
  • Pray for the Family Fun Day held at the Milpitas Main Campus this Sunday. Pray that God will strengthen and protect the responsible brothers and sisters and the young people, so that they may find peace and joy in serving God, also we may use this opportunity to attract more people to the church.
  • Pray for the 2026 volunteer election. Pray that God will help pastoral staff and church leaders nominate suitable individuals to participate in and promote the various church ministries next year.
  • Pray for the first joint Mandarin Music Evangelistic concert. Pray that God will use this concert to attract more Mandarin-speaking friends to come to church to listen to music and learn about God’s work in people’s lives.

Offerings Summary

Monthly Budget Target $ 485,466.37
Sep. General offering $ 340,897.12
Oct. General offering $ 94,415.28
 
Sep. Mission offering $ 3,783.05
Oct. Mission offering $ 2,706.28
 
Sep. Community Center offering $ 3,700.00
Oct. Community Center offering $ 0.00

Finance Summary

Jan. to Aug. Income ： $ 1,634,810.77
Jan. to Aug. Expenses ： $ 2,314,846.32
Jan. to Aug. Deficit ： $ 680,035.55

posts.title: 2025-10-12-shepherdsheart
posts.excerpt: 牧人心語 川普總統揚言他將前往中東，見證以色列和哈馬斯簽署和平條約的儀式，為中東這片不斷經歷戰亂的地區帶來長遠、甚至之久的和平。 我為川普總統努帶來的成果感恩，以哈停火，無疑可以挽救許多人脫離戰爭的摧殘，減少人命傷亡，但和平能維持多久仍言之過早。 接著，我看見三個污靈，好像青蛙，分別從戾龍的口、獸的口，和假先知的口出來。他們是鬼魔的靈，會行奇蹟。這些邪靈出去找全世界的王，把他們集合在一起，準備在全能上帝那偉大的日子裡作戰。於是，那些邪靈把諸王集合在一個地方；那地方希伯來話叫哈米吉多頓。（啟示錄 16: 13-14，16）現中 使徒約翰在異象中看到主再來世界終結的情況，神學家稱之為哈米吉多頓大戰。這是一個終極對決，乃全能真神與世上所有邪惡勢力、包括敵擋神的國家和他們的領袖的戰爭。全能真神必然獲勝，敵對者將被丟進硫磺的火湖裡永不超生。 這既是使徒約翰看見的異象，就應從寓意的角度去解讀，無需著眼在甚麼時間和那個地方發生。這個異象的寓意其實十分清楚，就是人犯罪墮落之後，被魔鬼引誘和利用來敵擋真神，無惡不作，罪惡滔天，引來神極大的忿怒，在末日，全能真神要把所有邪惡的勢力消滅，建立新天新地，讓神的子民，就是每一個真心相信並接受耶穌為救主的人得享永遠的福樂。 約翰所看見的異象，提醒我們仍活在世上的人，邪惡和不法的事只會越來越多、越來越恐佈。邪惡的勢力一日未完全被消滅，戰爭的殘酷和沒人性的事將繼續發生。約翰看見了全能真神如何得勝，帶給我們有無比的盼望和極大的勇氣去面對生活的殘酷。我們這些已經蒙恩得救的人，不單要憐恤那些落在困苦、絕望中的人，更應該明白天父上帝期待我們能成為這個黑暗世代的明燈，將平安的盼望和天國的福音帶給所有活在黑暗中的人。 主內的弟兄姊妹，我希望我們不要只為今天、只為自己和自己的家人而活，我希望我們能看見使徒約翰所看見的。約翰被囚在拔摩島，他所能做的是把所看見的寫下來告訴我們；但我們在知道之後，可有想過能為天父爸爸做點甚麼？ 招牧師 代禱事項 讚美感謝神讓我們能知道世界的結局。感謝神賜給我們有平安的盼望和永生的把握。求神使用我們餘下的生命引領人出黑暗、入光明。 為這星期日在Pleasanton分堂舉行的家庭同樂日祈禱。求神賜喜樂與平安給出席的社區人士，並保守籌備和負責各個活動的主內弟兄姊妹有事奉神的喜樂。 為Pastor Caleb Hankin 下週將與按牧團見面祈禱。求神藉按牧團能確認其信仰根基和蒙召的經歷。 為執事按立籌備委員會和教會修章委員會祈禱。求聖靈感動和賜智慧給這兩個委員會的成員，讓他能早日完成他們的任務。 為各堂會開始籌組明年的事奉團隊祈禱。求神帶領各堂會的教牧同工和信徒領袖物色有能力和樂意事奉的同工，一起為教會明年的發展齊心協力。 奉獻簡報 每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37 九月常費奉獻 $ 340,897.12 十月常費奉獻 $ 67,501.10 […]

牧人心語

川普總統揚言他將前往中東，見證以色列和哈馬斯簽署和平條約的儀式，為中東這片不斷經歷戰亂的地區帶來長遠、甚至之久的和平。

我為川普總統努帶來的成果感恩，以哈停火，無疑可以挽救許多人脫離戰爭的摧殘，減少人命傷亡，但和平能維持多久仍言之過早。

接著，我看見三個污靈，好像青蛙，分別從戾龍的口、獸的口，和假先知的口出來。他們是鬼魔的靈，會行奇蹟。這些邪靈出去找全世界的王，把他們集合在一起，準備在全能上帝那偉大的日子裡作戰。於是，那些邪靈把諸王集合在一個地方；那地方希伯來話叫哈米吉多頓。（啟示錄 16: 13-14，16）現中

使徒約翰在異象中看到主再來世界終結的情況，神學家稱之為哈米吉多頓大戰。這是一個終極對決，乃全能真神與世上所有邪惡勢力、包括敵擋神的國家和他們的領袖的戰爭。全能真神必然獲勝，敵對者將被丟進硫磺的火湖裡永不超生。

這既是使徒約翰看見的異象，就應從寓意的角度去解讀，無需著眼在甚麼時間和那個地方發生。這個異象的寓意其實十分清楚，就是人犯罪墮落之後，被魔鬼引誘和利用來敵擋真神，無惡不作，罪惡滔天，引來神極大的忿怒，在末日，全能真神要把所有邪惡的勢力消滅，建立新天新地，讓神的子民，就是每一個真心相信並接受耶穌為救主的人得享永遠的福樂。

約翰所看見的異象，提醒我們仍活在世上的人，邪惡和不法的事只會越來越多、越來越恐佈。邪惡的勢力一日未完全被消滅，戰爭的殘酷和沒人性的事將繼續發生。約翰看見了全能真神如何得勝，帶給我們有無比的盼望和極大的勇氣去面對生活的殘酷。我們這些已經蒙恩得救的人，不單要憐恤那些落在困苦、絕望中的人，更應該明白天父上帝期待我們能成為這個黑暗世代的明燈，將平安的盼望和天國的福音帶給所有活在黑暗中的人。

主內的弟兄姊妹，我希望我們不要只為今天、只為自己和自己的家人而活，我希望我們能看見使徒約翰所看見的。約翰被囚在拔摩島，他所能做的是把所看見的寫下來告訴我們；但我們在知道之後，可有想過能為天父爸爸做點甚麼？

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 讚美感謝神讓我們能知道世界的結局。感謝神賜給我們有平安的盼望和永生的把握。求神使用我們餘下的生命引領人出黑暗、入光明。
  • 為這星期日在Pleasanton分堂舉行的家庭同樂日祈禱。求神賜喜樂與平安給出席的社區人士，並保守籌備和負責各個活動的主內弟兄姊妹有事奉神的喜樂。
  • 為Pastor Caleb Hankin 下週將與按牧團見面祈禱。求神藉按牧團能確認其信仰根基和蒙召的經歷。
  • 為執事按立籌備委員會和教會修章委員會祈禱。求聖靈感動和賜智慧給這兩個委員會的成員，讓他能早日完成他們的任務。
  • 為各堂會開始籌組明年的事奉團隊祈禱。求神帶領各堂會的教牧同工和信徒領袖物色有能力和樂意事奉的同工，一起為教會明年的發展齊心協力。

一月至八月缺欠： $ 680,035.55

From the Heart of a Shepherd

President Trump said that he will travel to the Middle East to witness the signing of a peace treaty between Israel and Hamas, bringing lasting, perhaps even permanent, peace to this war-torn region.

I am grateful for the results of President Trump’s efforts. The ceasefire between Israel and Hamas will undoubtedly save many from the devastation of war and reduce the loss of life, yet it is too early to say how long the peace will last.

Then I saw three unclean spirits, like frogs, coming out of the mouth of the dragon, the mouth of the beast, and the mouth of the false prophet. They are demonic spirits, capable of performing miracles. These evil spirits go out to seek out the kings of the world and gather them together for battle on the great day of God Almighty. Then, the evil spirits gather the kings together at the place which, in Hebrew, is called Armageddon. (Revelation 16:13-14, 16)

The apostle John saw in vision the end of the world before the Lord’s return, which theologians call the battle of Armageddon. This is the ultimate showdown, a war between Almighty God and all the evil forces in the world, including nations and their leaders who oppose Him. Almighty God will inevitably triumph, and his opponents will be cast into the lake of fire and brimstone, never to be reborn.

Since this is a vision seen by the apostle John, it should be interpreted allegorically. We should not focus on when and where of its occurrence. The allegory of this vision is quite clear: after humanity’s fall into sin, they were tempted and manipulated by the devil to oppose the true God, committing all kind of evil and heinous crimes, incurring God’s immense wrath. At the end of the world, Almighty God will destroy all evil forces and establish a new heaven and a new earth, allowing His people—everyone who truly believes in and accepts Jesus as their Savior—to enjoy eternal bliss.

John’s vision reminds us who still live in this world that evil and lawlessness will only increase in severity and become more horrific. As long as the evil forces are not eliminated completely, the cruelty and inhumanity of war will continue. John’s witness to the triumph of Almighty God gives us immense hope and courage to face the cruelties of life. Those of us who have been saved should not only have compassion for those in hardship and despair, but should also understand that our Heavenly Father desires us to be a beacon of light in this dark age, bringing the hope of peace and the gospel of the Heavenly Kingdom to all who are living in darkness.

Brothers and sisters in Christ, I hope we don’t live just for today, or for ourselves, and our families. I hope we can see what the Apostle John saw. Imprisoned on the island of Patmos, all John could do was to write down what he saw and share it with us. But after we learn these things, have we ever thought about what we can do for our Heavenly Father?

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise and thank God for allowing us to know the end of the world. Thank God for giving us the hope of peace and the assurance of eternal life. Pray that God will use the remaining days of our lives to lead others out of darkness and into the light of God.
  • Pray for the Family Fun Day held at the Pleasanton campus this Sunday, and at Milpitas on the following Sunday. Pray that God will grant joy and peace to whoever attend, and pray that the brothers and sisters in Christ who will organize and lead various programs will find joy in serving God.
  • Pray for Pastor Caleb Hankin’s pastoral examination next week. Pray that God will use the ordination committee to confirm his faith and calling.
  • Pray for the Deacon Ordination Planning Committee and the Church Constitution and Bylaw Revision Committee. Pray that the Holy Spirit will inspire and grant wisdom to the members of these two committees so that they can quickly complete their tasks.
  • Pray for each church to begin organizing its service teams for next year. Pray that God will guide the pastoral staff and lay leaders of each church campus to identify capable and willing co-workers so that they can work together for the church’s development next year.

posts.content:
牧人心語

我今天和一個在機構服事的牧者午膳。他是牧師的牧師，專門幫助牧師維持身體、心靈和靈性的健康。他所安排的活動包括帶牧師上山祈禱、做運動、在營火前坦誠分享在事奉中的掙扎和創傷等。

他建議男同工要學互擁抱，坦誠分享傷害和彼此饒恕。正如歌羅西書所說的：所以，你們既是神的選民，聖潔蒙愛的人，就要存憐憫、恩慈、謙虛、溫柔、忍耐的心。倘若這人與那人有嫌隙，總要彼此包容，彼此饒恕；主怎樣饒恕了你們，你們也要怎樣饒恕人。（歌羅西書 3:12-13）

事實上，這個牧師的建議不單是給牧師、傳道人，保羅的勸勉和提醒是給每個被神揀選、蒙神所愛的人。如果我們相信自己已經是蒙神揀選和被愛的人，我們對人、特別是對主內的弟兄姊妹，就更應存憐憫、恩慈、謙虛、溫柔、忍耐的心。我們對這些勸勉都沒有太大問題，雖然並不是每一樣都做得很好。但當保羅提到人與人之間若有嫌隙，我們總要彼此包容，彼此饒恕。情況可就不一樣了。因為裡面包含有誤會、傷害和忿怒。

我就想起Charlie Kirk的妻子Erika公開說她會饒恕殺害她丈夫的兇手。我聽見時覺得不可思議。兇手有認罪嗎？有後悔嗎？在司法程序上到現時仍沒有。Erika怎麼可能在這個時候就饒恕Tyler Robinson？我相信她是實踐聖經所說的：主怎樣饒恕了你們，你們也要怎樣饒恕人。

主是怎樣饒恕了我們的？是在我們還作罪人的時候，是在我們還不知悔改的時候，是在我們還攻擊祂、污蔑祂、陷害祂的時候，主耶穌就已經饒恕了我們。這不是人可以靠意志可以做到的事。除非我們的生命被基督的愛填滿了，基督的愛淹蓋了一切怨恨、撫平了所有創傷，平息了一切忿怒。

主內的弟兄姊妹，我們對某些人，包括家人和主內的弟兄姊妹，心中是否仍有嫌隙？我們能存憐憫、恩慈、謙虛、溫柔、忍耐的心去對待他們、愛他們嗎？當我們受傷害、被污蔑和刻意攻擊時，我們仍能饒恕這些得罪自己的人嗎？願神幫助我們。

容旭輝傳道已於上週三通過按牧團審查其呼召及信德，現依會章公告全會眾。會眾若有任何意見，請於十月二十六日前以書面署名交教牧團隊跟進。謝謝。

招牧師

代禱事項

  • 讚美感謝神讓容旭輝傳道順利通過按牧團查問信仰和全職事奉意願。請大家為其心志和恩賜得以完全發揮祈禱。
  • 為我們能經常記念主愛，被祂的大愛充滿祈禱。求神讓我們能以耶穌為榜樣，有能力去寬恕那些得罪我們的人。
  • 為十月十四日在Pleasanton分堂舉行的家庭同樂日祈禱。求神藉此增進教會與社區之間的關係，吸引更多人來追求認識基督的信仰。
  • 為身體心靈有軟弱的弟兄姊妹代禱。求神在人的軟弱中彰顯祂的恩典，讓病患者得安慰和醫治。
  • 為慶祝 25週年籌備委員會祈禱。求神的靈引領他們利用這特別時刻，幫助會眾學習如何數算神的祝福和恩典，並受激勵同心隨主引領作主工。

一月至八月缺欠： $ 680,035.55

From the Heart of a Shepherd

Today I had lunch with a pastor who serves in a Christian organization. He’s a pastor of pastors, specializing in helping pastors maintain physical, mental, and spiritual health. His ministries include taking pastors on mountain prayer trips, exercise sessions, and candidly sharing their ministry struggles and wounds around a campfire.

He advised male ministers to learn to embrace one another, openly share hurts, and forgive one another. As Colossians says: “Therefore, as God’s chosen people, holy and beloved, clothe yourselves with compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience. Bear with one another and forgive one another if anyone has a complaint against another. Just as the Lord has forgiven you, so you also must forgive.” (Colossians 3:12-13)

In fact, this pastor’s advice is not just for pastors and preachers. Paul’s exhortation and reminder are for everyone chosen and loved by God. If we believe we are chosen and loved by God, we should be compassionate, kind, humble, gentle, and patient toward others, especially toward our brothers and sisters in Christ. I believe we do not have much problems with these exhortations, even although we may not be able to do it all the time. However, when Paul mentioned that we should always bear with one another and forgive each other if there are grievances against one another, the situation is quite different because it might involve misunderstandings, hurt, and anger.

I am reminded of Charlie Kirk’s wife, Erika, who publicly declared that she would forgive her husband’s murderer. I found it incredible when I heard this. Had the murderer confessed his guilt? Had he expressed remorse? He did not. How could Erika forgive Tyler Robinson at this point? I believe she was practicing what the Bible says: “As the Lord has forgiven you, so you also must forgive.”

How did the Lord forgive us? While we were still sinners, while we were unrepentant, while we were still attacking, slandering, and framing Him, the Lord Jesus forgave us. This is not something that can be accomplished by the will of man alone. Unless our lives are filled with the love of Christ, which is able to cover all resentment, heal all wounds, and calm all anger. Otherwise, we will not be able to achieve this.

Brothers and sisters in Christ, do we still harbor resentment toward certain people, including family members and fellow Christians? Can we treat them with compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience, loving them? When we are hurt, slandered, and deliberately attacked, can we forgive those who have offended us? May God help us.

Pastor Sam Yung passed the ordination review of his calling and faith last Wednesday. We now announce to the entire congregation in accordance with the church bylaw for his ordination. If any members have any concerns, please submit them in written form with signature to the pastoral team for follow-up by October 26th. Thank you.

Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise and thank God for Pastor Sam’s ordination confirmation for his willingness to become a full-time servant of God. Please pray for his determination and gifts to be fully realized.
  • Pray that we will constantly remember the Lord’s love and be filled with His great compassion. Pray that we will follow Jesus’ example and have the strength to forgive those who have sinned against us.
  • Pray for the Family Fun Day held at the Pleasanton campus on October 14th. Pray that this event will strengthen the relationship between the church and the community and attract more people to learn more about Christian faith.
  • Pray for brothers and sisters who are weak in body and mind. Pray that God will manifest His grace in our weaknesses, so that those who are sick may find comfort and healing.
  • Pray for the 25th Anniversary Celebration Planning Committee. Pray that God’s Spirit will guide them to use this special occasion to help the congregation learn to count God’s blessings and grace, and be inspired to unite our effort to do His work.

posts.content:
牧人心語

我上週末在一個網上的基督徒教育大會中分享了一個專題，題為：教牧是個維修工人還是個開發商？不知大家的答案是甚麼？我的答案是：教牧是個屬靈領袖，他必須維護教會信仰的純正，持守真理，也需要尋問神心意，應如何進一步拓展天國事工，完成神的召命。

當日下午，我出席了一個牧師的按牧典禮。這個牧者被神呼召向猶太人傳福音。他必須了解猶太教和基督教信仰之間的異同，並需要有智慧與猶太人交往，向他們禪明聖經真理。

和有深厚傳統的猶太人傳福音不能用傳統方法，必須先融入他們的社群之中。這些都不是一般人能做好的事情，必須仰賴聖靈的帶領和幫助。我為著這個牧者和他的家人祈禱，求神大大使用他向神的選民傳福音。

其實，我們每個牧養教會的牧師也必須仰賴聖靈的帶領、供應和幫助，才能完成神賜給我們的召命。我們清楚知道：不是倚靠勢力，不是倚靠才能，乃是倚靠我神的靈方能成事。（撒迦利亞書 4:6）但曾幾何時，我們忘記了主神的提醒，不自覺地成了一個維修工人或開發商。求神憐憫和光照我們，讓我們不是倚靠自己才能、經驗、知識，乃是倚靠我神的靈去服事，並能見證神的恩典和能力。

上主日，半島分堂首次在神為我們預備、座落在Belmont 市公園內的設施聚會，得到來自不同堂會弟兄姊妹的支持，有八十多人出席崇拜，並有一人決志信主。感謝讚美神。

慶祝教會成立 25週年的敬拜聚會和活動正籌備得如火如荼。按立牧師團亦會在這兩星期審查兩位後選人的資格和信德。請為容旭輝傳道和 Caleb Hankin傳道代禱，求神繼續祝福和模造他們成為主所重用的工人。

按立教會執事籌備委員會亦已於上週召開了首次會議，修訂了按立執事研究小組的研究報告，並擬定了籌備按立執事的進程，希望於年終會員大會時通過按立執事的相關提案。

你的牧師

代禱事項

  • 讚美感謝神為半島分堂預備了美好的聚會設施，讓參加者感恩讚歎不已。當日並有一人決志信主。請繼續為半島分堂的未來發展祈禱。
  • 按立牧師團祈禱。求神讓這些資深牧者能幫助教會考查容旭輝傳道和Caleb Hankin蒙召的心志和信德，印證他們全職事奉的呼召。
  • 為中秋節週末已分別安排在Tracy, Milpitas, 和San Leandro分堂舉行的外展活動祈禱。求神使用這些活動團結教會弟兄姊妹，並引領新朋友前來參加。
  • 為教會支持的宣教士和宣教機構祈禱。求神補足他們的缺欠，並加添我們對他們的關心。我們支持的機構包括中國信徒佈道會，彩虹事工，少數民族協會，商場佈道等。
  • 為基督徒能有像Charlie Kirk一樣，敢於為真理作見證的勇氣和膽量祈禱。求神激勵我們要起來積極傳福音。

奉獻簡報

每月預算目標 $ 485,466.37
八月常費奉獻 $ 247,321.02
九月常費奉獻 $ 318,649.99
 
八月差傳奉獻 $ 685.87
九月差傳奉獻 $ 1,436.28
 
八月社區中心奉獻 $ 15,612.83
九月社區中心奉獻 $ 3,500.00

財政簡報

一月至八月總收入： $ 1,634,810.77
一月至八月總開支： $ 2,314,846.32
一月至八月缺欠： $ 680,035.55

From the Heart of a Shepherd

Last Saturday, I shared a topic at an online Christian conference entitled “Is a pastor a maintenance worker or a developer?” I wonder what would be your answer. My answer is: A pastor is a spiritual leader. He must protect the purity of the Christian faith and uphold the truth. He also needs to seek God’s guidance on how to further expand the Kingdom ministry and fulfill God’s calling.

That afternoon, I attended an ordination ceremony of a pastor. This pastor was called by God to share the gospel to the Jewish people. He must understand the similarities and differences between Judaism and Christianity and interact with the Jewish people with tact when explaining biblical truths to them.

Preaching the gospel to Jews with deep traditions cannot be done with traditional methods. He must first blend into their community and ask for the guidance and help of the Holy Spirit. I pray for this pastor and his family, asking God to use them mightily to preach the gospel to God’s chosen people.

In fact, each of us pastors who pastor a church must rely on the guidance, provision, and help of the Holy Spirit to fulfill our God-given calling. We know that it is not by might, nor by power, but by the Spirit of our God that things are accomplished (Zechariah 4:6). Yet, at some point, we forgot the Lord’s warning and unwittingly served like maintenance workers or developers. May God have mercy on us and enlighten us, so that we may serve not by our own talents, experience, or knowledge, but by the Spirit of God, so that we may bear witness to His grace and power.

Last Sunday, the Peninsula Campus held its first service at the God-prepared facility located inside the Belmont City Park. With the support of brothers and sisters from various campuses, over 80 people attended the worship service, and one person made a decision to become a Christian. Thank you and praise God.

Preparations for the worship service and activities to celebrate the church’s 25th anniversary are in full swing. The Pastor’s Ordination Council will also review the qualifications and examine the faith of the two candidates in these two weeks. Please pray for Pastors Sam Yung and Caleb Hankin, asking God to continue blessing and molding them into ministers whom the Lord can greatly use.

The Planning Committee for the Ordination of Deacons also held its first meeting last week. The committee revised the report of the Deacon Ordination Study Group and outlined a process for preparing for the ordination of deacons. We hope to approve the proposal for the ordination of deacons at the year-end general meeting.

Your Pastor Chiu

Prayer Requests

  • Praise and thank God for providing the beautiful meeting facilities to the Peninsula Campus, which amazed the attendees. One person also made a decision to believe in Christ that day. Please continue to pray for the future development of the Peninsula Campus.
  • Pray for the pastor’s ordination council. Pray that these senior pastors will help the church examine the heart and faith of Pastors Sam Yung and Caleb Hankin, and confirm their call to full-time Christian ministry.
  • Pray for the outreach activities planned for the Mid-Autumn Festival weekend at the Tracy, Milpitas, and San Leandro Campuses. Pray that these activities will unite the church members and bring new friends to the church.
  • Pray for the missionaries and missionary organizations supported by the church. Pray that God will provide their needs and increase our care for them. We support organizations such as the Chinese Christian Mission, Rainbow Ministry, the Ethnic Minorities Association, and shopping Mall Evangelism.
  • Pray that Christians will have the courage and boldness to bear witness to the truth, like Charlie Kirk. May God inspire us to actively spread the Good News of Christ.

Offerings Summary

Monthly Budget Target $ 485,466.37
Aug. General offering $ 247,321.02
Sep. General offering $ 318,649.99
 
Aug. Mission offering $ 685.87
Sep. Mission offering $ 1,436.28
 
Aug. Community Center offering $ 15,612.83
Sep. Community Center offering $ 3,500.00

Finance Summary

Jan. to Aug. Income ： $ 1,634,810.77
Jan. to Aug. Expenses ： $ 2,314,846.32
Jan. to Aug. Deficit ： $ 680,035.55
